classification.summary: Customer is satisfied with ShipStation for multi-brand management and appreciates its competitive shipping rates compared to Shopify.

content.body:
I have used Shipstation for 4+ years. I liked Shipstation despite its quirks. Two weeks ago they overfilled my Stamps.com by $800 account due to their system error when we tried to ship and refill our account. When your Stamps.com account balance is too low, a window will pop up to refill it. We recharged with $200, or so we thought, but we got the prompt again that we didn't have enough balance and we needed to purchase more. Did it. .system error - same thing. Little did we know their purchases were delayed by 20 to 30 minutes and each time we pressed the buy button, it was purchasing more shipping and creating a shipment, but not showing the shipment or updating the balance in our account. So 5 transactions, $200 each -$800 more than needed. I only found this with our credit card transaction review. We called them and they refused to refund me without canceling my Stamps.com account. They were very interested in how this happens, so guessing they were debugging their system error. We didn't need $1000 shipping, so after we reached out to them and tried to resolve it, we contested with our credit card for $600 of that. Shipstation was very quick to shut my account down. If there is anything I can say about Shipstation is that system of shutting off a customer's account is very quick and efficient. Good job. After we realized our account was shut down, we called back in and they said the only way to get reactivated was to bill back the $600. Without options and needing to ship, we caved and said go ahead. Start the clock, it took them another 7 days before we could ship. This service feels like they really don't want me as a customer or think overcharging and holding hundreds of dollars of customer money is good business. Will I recommend Shipstation - No Way - something is broken over there. did I before this? Yes. I wasted over 6+ hours of my time over 7 days resolving Shipstation's screws ups and bureaucracy in getting my account turned on. I don't know if there are better options at this point, but you can be sure I am scheduling time to figure it out. If you want to count: 7 calls over 7 days to get this resolved. 6+ hours of my time. On several calls with primary support, the agent said they couldn't resolve my issues - Only the people at XXX number could resolve this. Then when I called the XXX number, they said they couldn't resolve the issue either and to call back the original number. I asked for a supervisor, said there is none and to call back the regular number. Did that, waited on hold again asked for a supervisor, agent said no for 15 minutes until he spent the time reviewing my case and asking all the same questions. Never got to speak with a supervisor. I run a business - like all people who have a Shopify account. Stuff happens, but when it does having your account shut down for a system-critical service is a real issue. If you do use their services, have a plan in place for when you have issues and expect multiple-day downtimes. Expect no apologies. Expect no one to take responsibility. Expect a lot of broken promises and wasted follow-up. Also, they sent me a survey to ask how they did. After starting, I realized it would have taken me over 30 minutes to complete it. I opted to spend that time here to let potential customers know about my experience. Update 6/23/2022 - Shipstation/Stamps management reached out to me by phone/email to understand this issue better and see what went wrong after seeing this review. They are going to look through their support strings and try to figure out what went wrong here and try to make it right. There is someone at the other end of the line here listening at least.
Update 10/23/2023 -We have used shipstation as a backup and for very specific shipping needs, but find that shopify rates are the same or better in most instances. If you use UPS and UPS misses a $200 overnight first - you can try to get a refund from Shipstation, but they have a weird form, zero follow up and say that if UPS approves the refund, we will see a refund - just did an quick check against our and I have never seen a refund - at least 3, likely 5 submission this year.  Seems like they give you a place to push buttons with zero follow up.   They don't have any paper trail.  Still don't recommend these guys - they will stay as a backup for us unless they don't like this review.
If you are another vendor, don't reach out to me to solicit based on this.  I am covered.

classification.summary: Customer experienced a critical billing system error with Shipstation that overcharged them $800, and after disputing the charge, their account was shut down and took 7 days to reactivate, leaving them frustrated with the service quality and customer treatment.

content.body: Making the move to partner with a 3PL for our eCommerce site was pretty scary! But Pascalle and the team at Shipmonk have gone over and above in supporting us during the transition. We've been super impressed with their communication and timely responses. We'll definitely be recommending Shipmonk!

classification.summary: Emily The Strange is satisfied with ShipMonk's 3PL services and praising their communication and support during the transition process.

content.body:
They lost my inventory!
ShipBob is terrible and I will be moving to another 3PL provider ASAP.
I was hesitant what with the negative reviews here and on TrustPilot, but the sales team and onboarding process gave me confidence. Boy was I wrong and should've gone with my first instinct to avoid them like the plague.
On a single receiving order they managed to create chaos and have nearly destroyed my business.
Some of the specific issues that are still not resolved.
1. On receiving an order they incorrectly weighed items so the weight in the system was 5x the actual weight, there is no way to change this data. We use CartBob (another Shopify app) for dynamic shipping rates and the impact of this is that customers were overcharged 2-3x for shipping. Many potential customers rightly dropped off and frequent customers complained that we were ripping them off on shipping (fair point). I raised the issue 6 days ago, was assured the items would be rescanned 5 days ago and still nothing has been fixed. They also had the audacity to say they were going to charge me for the time of rescanning the affected products, despite it clearly being their fault.
2. 360 units of SKUs were deleted from their system in error. The stock is sitting there as I can see the history, but the system is saying it's 0. I raised with support and after 3 days they have not resolved the issue. They just so happened to be the highest selling SKUs and so the marketing dollars spent on driving traffic is wasted.
I can accept that issues happen, but the most important thing is taking responsibility and correcting them in a timeframe that minimises the damage to their customers business.
When things go well, it works well, however if there is any issue they are impossible to reach and the response time is disgraceful.
The support team are incredibly slow and operate with an arrogance, disdain and severe lack of empathy for the customers.
---UPDATE---After 7 days they have told me that they can't find the 360 items of inventory, despite there being a visible audit history in the system of the inventory being received on their end. What's particularly interesting is all inventory changes are tied to a specific users full name, but in the case of deleting the inventory it was tied to a shared user name ("Junior 2") so the actual person responsible is not identifiable. This gives an insight into how their internal operations work.
A 3PL that loses that amount of inventory cannot and should not be trusted.
I have a simple business, only 26 SKUs, everything lightweight and nothing bulky.
They are amateurs and completely negligent.
Do not trust them with your business.

classification.summary: ecommerce brand is actively switching away from ShipBob due to critical inventory management failures, poor customer support responsiveness, and significant business impact from unresolved errors.

Also our first big delivery with them was a big big big fail, we were overcharged with UPS because of their weight "errors"above - they split up 1 big order to 8 orders which were not packed professionally, they did a miserable job with taping up boxes and putting heavy items in a no-bubble plastic envelopes like true beginners and arrived to my client all destroyed.

content.body:
Just awful. I have been using a mom and pop company to fulfill my goods for years with no issues, but their software is really dated. So I tried Shipbob to compare the two. Wow. It's just been a disaster from day one. My onboarding rep was very hard to reach and I had to ask him the same question 5x to get an answer via email. They tried multiple times to weight and size my items when they arrived but never did get a good handle on it. The same product in the same size but a different color would come out like 2x the weight, for example. Customer service is very odd. You create a case via email and then get new emails for each reply they make, it's nearly impossible to keep track of all the emails about 1 issue. There is no way to go back and see past issues unless you keep those emails. They have lost inbound shipments. Lastly, almost every single inbound shipment is not received correctly and they are confused about the orders causing my items to be placed in an On Hold status and I am charged $25 per day until it's resolved.
It's a nightmare. I'm frantically trying to get out of there as quickly as possible.

classification.summary: Current ShipBob user experiencing critical fulfillment failures including lost shipments, inaccurate inventory management, poor onboarding support, and daily hold fees, and is actively seeking to switch providers immediately.

content.body:
DO NOT USE THIS COMPANY TO FULFILL YOUR PRODUCTS!! I have used shipbob for over 2 years now and thought they were decent, minor issues but nothing crazy. Until one day out of the blue they told me they could no longer ship my product because of some sort of policy, BUT THEY HAD ALREADY BEEN SHIPPING THIS ITEM FOR ME FOR MONTHS to thousands of customers. They stopped shipping out any of my orders so I had no way to fulfil orders product to thousands of pending orders. The customer support is ABSOLUTELY TERRIBLE, I found a new warehouse within 1 day and have been trying to get shipbob to ship my inventory from their warehouse to my new fulfilment centre AND THEY HAVE NOT EVEN SHIPPED IT YET! IT'S BEEN OVER 3 WEEKS SINCE I'VE ASKED THEM TOO!!! My business has lost hundreds of thousands of dollars and I've had to pause all marketing and refund orders that Shipbob could not fulfill. PLEASE NEVER USE THIS COMPANY! You are much better off using Ship Dudes or Ship Monk - much better shipping and customer service experience overall. I am at a loss for words on how terrible this company is and how terrible they treat their customers and business they work alongside. Do yourself a favor and use someone else!
-Riley

content.body:
Easyship has been handling all our orders since early 2022, and our overall experience has been very positive. The logistics industry is complex, so hiccups are inevitable, regardless of the provider, courier, or 3PL you choose. What matters is that Easyship consistently manages such situations in a professional and expedient manner. We are equally impressed with the technological aspect of their platform: the dashboard is user-friendly, the configuration options are flexible, and the integrations (including Shopify rate calculations and order sync) work flawlessly. We greatly value their personalized approach and willingness to adapt to our needs.
One time, in one of our regions, we made the mistake of trying to use Sh*pB*b. This cost us thousands of dollars, resulted in many chargebacks from dissatisfied customers, and imposed an exceptionally high workload on our support department. After making the switch to Easyship, these problems were gone.

classification.summary: Customer is satisfied with their current 3PL provider (Easyship) and sharing a negative experience they had with a competitor (ShipBob) that caused significant financial and operational problems.

content.body: Absolute rubbish. The support is shocking, so incompetent and will never acknowledge an error. The servers are always down, shipconnect doesn't work half the time and the don't include the discounts in the commercial invoice so the customers get chared taxes on what the items cost full price not what they actually paid for them.

classification.summary: Customer is frustrated with poor support, system reliability issues, and tax calculation errors on commercial invoices but has not yet indicated plans to switch providers.

content.body: FRAUDULENT COMPANY!I agreed to $20/month for the app. They have been charging my credit card for $49.99/month for 3 months and refuse to reimburse. Then they tell you that you need to add $$ to your shipping account - In fact for Canadians using Fedex you do not use these funds and they still have not refunded the $$ that I put into my shipping account in the app. They have customer Service until you are signed on, and then its almost impossible to get through to someone.DO NOT GET THIS APP!

classification.summary: Customer is actively seeking to switch away from their current fulfillment app due to billing overcharges, refused reimbursements, and poor customer service.

content.body: More than happy to take your money and leave you waiting for months without solutions. It takes 2 weeks for them to get anything done and even then its often wrong.

classification.summary: Customer is frustrated with slow service delivery and frequent errors from their current fulfillment provider.

content.body:
We've shipped 5,350 orders using this terrible software and this is our review. I write this review as we currently have 250+ orders that need to be shipped. We have countless upset customers emailing us to inquire about their late and unreceived orders. We haven't been able to bulk ship orders because Shipstation's software is down. USPS altered their shipping services 11 days ago on July 9th. Because of this slight change at USPS all of our orders that will use USPS can not be bulk shipped. The only options we have now is to either ship orders one at a time or to use another more expensive shipping service like UPS and FedEx which will cost us hundreds of dollars. We've tried contacting Shipstation via their chat support 3 times in 3 days for almost a week. Each time we've spoken to a new lazy, slow and poorly trained agent that seems to be from a foreign country. They've waste our time and failed to solve this issue or to tell us when it would be fixed. Each time we're asked to send screenshots and are asked a bunch of useless and generic questions about our issue. We've also spoken to their "premium" phone support 2 times in 2 days who've told us Shipstation has known about this software error for many days and has yet to fix it. When we told them how frustrated we were about this and how long it was taking to be fixed we were given a typical corporate nonsense response that sounded something like "our engineers are aware of this issue and are working very hard to resolve it very soon."
In our opinion Shipstation is:1. A poorly designed software that constantly breaks and causes us slow shipping times and headaches.2. Is too complicated and hard to learn and use. Simple tasks require multiple steps.3. Has poorly trained, slow and useless support that don't know how to troubleshoot and fix their own software.4. Is too expensive considering the low quality service it offers.5. Has pathetically slow progression when it comes to fixing issues with their software.

classification.summary: A frustrated ecommerce brand is actively seeking an alternative to ShipStation due to software outages, poor customer support, and high shipping costs that are impacting their ability to fulfill orders at scale.

content.body:
We have been using EasyShip for nearly 3 years. During that time we have had significant challenges (on normal features and while testing beta-features) due to internal and external factors. Our Account Managers (we've had several during that time) have been responsive when these challenges arose and were solution oriented. My advice to anyone considering this service is to learn about setting up shipping rules to best serve your business and customer. If done correctly and thoroughly, everyone's lives are made simple.
While there is a customer service team, any orders sent using a limited or basic tracking courier they're unable to aid in tracking down missing/lost parcels. Pay careful attention to label prices you're paying and what the app is charging your customer.
Overall, EasyShip is a good service with simple integration with our Shopify store.

classification.summary: EasyShip user providing a balanced review noting responsive account management but highlighting concerns about tracking limitations for basic couriers and label pricing transparency.

content.body:
I've been using Easyship for approximately 5 years to send parcels to the US and other international destinations in partnership with a third party broker that carries parcels from Canada to the US for deposit with USPS, UPS, etc. A great deal has improved over the years, but even from the start, Easyship offered the most accurate volumetric rate based system that helped us save so much time by not needing to manually enter the weight or dimensions of every single parcel. With respect to more recent changes, Easyship now has its own in-house insurance system which is easier and faster to use than anything that preceeded it. I'm very happy with Easyship and forsee using it for years to come.
One last thought: i'm hearing impaired and am grateful for the ability to seek support via email instead of being forced into phone calls.

classification.summary: A satisfied long-term Easyship user from Canada praising their volumetric rate system and insurance offerings, with appreciation for email support accessibility.

content.body: Great customer service. We've used them for several companies. Everything is transparent and integrates pretty easily. Any hiccups are responded to promptly.

classification.summary: Existing satisfied customer praising Saltbox's transparency, integration ease, and responsive customer service across multiple companies.

content.body:
I would stay away from them completely unless they hire new staff and rebuild their software and their customer support team. They are unresponsive, lack knowledge, and always point their finger at someone else as the root cause of the issue, even when it ultimately comes down to their poorly written software.
Their software is not updated in a timely manner, so when Shopify makes an update , ShipStation no longer works and you are sitting waiting for 6+ months for them to actually fix it so that you can get orders out without the fear that things are not going to work.

classification.summary: Company is actively seeking to leave their current 3PL provider due to unresponsive customer support, outdated software with extended downtime after platform updates, and lack of accountability for operational failures.

content.body: Fulfillrite is a reliable and honest company that's great to work with.  They are also happy to help with custom projects, which my company ended up needing more than I originally anticipated.  Highly recommended!

classification.summary: Positive review of Fulfillrite praising their reliability, honesty, and willingness to accommodate custom projects.

content.body: We've worked with many fulfillment partners over the years. Shipmonk is one of the best platforms we've used and it is constantly improving. Their support is also one of the best we've experienced. Recent expansion has put a slight strain on their team, as we've cycled through several "Happiness Engineers" in the past year, but they do their best and response time remains quite fast. Their MonkProtect service has been a real game changer for us, allowing us to handle shipping and fulfillment claims with basically no friction: it's a win for our customers and for us.

classification.summary: Customer is satisfied with ShipMonk's fulfillment and support services, with only minor concerns about recent support team turnover.

content.body:
I have edited my review in July 2023Previously i thought"This makes my life so much more simple.Firstly, the support I have had is really good. An initial meeting was set up with someone and she supported me all the way.I have very complex settings to enable me to automate my shipping method and weight, and the app is very customisable to your needs.I can easily download all of my shipments before I confirm them, so I can count them and make sure they are correct first. It enables you to easily flag express orders and certain types of orders.You can also use it to print out all of your packing slips, which is very useful. It also tells you if you have already printed them.I used to use Royal mail click and drop, but this makes it so much easier.It is working really well."
NOW HOWEVER I have had a number of shipments that I cant create a label for. I get strange error messages. Support are unable to help. Unfortunately unless it is a simple error, support have to escalate the query and usually this means you NEVER hear back with a solution. I usually give up at this point and have to go direct to Click and Drop and create a label there. On one occasion I was told i would have to wait 2 weeks!! To which I said to not bother as I needed it sorted by end of day.FOR WEEKS I have had an issue with Ship Station Connect disconnecting, making it an utter nightmare to get my labels printed. Nobody is sorting it out. They tell you to do basic stuff which I have done and have had no effect, as I had thought. I keep getting stupid emails saying "let us know if you are still having issues".It is really slow now too and keeps glitchingPlus in shopify it says your app is unsupported now and needs updating. What is going on?I give up and am NOW LOOKING TO LEAVE TO A DIFFERENT APP.

classification.summary: User is actively leaving their current shipping/fulfillment app due to persistent technical issues, poor support response times, and system glitches that are impacting their ability to print labels and manage orders efficiently.

content.body: Amazing update from Easyship, which now offers insurance coverage that is easy to use and provides good ease of mind. In addition, our account manager, Calvin has been the key driver to ensure we received the best support. Thank you Easyship, Keep up the good work!

classification.summary: Customer is praising Easyship's insurance coverage and account manager support, indicating satisfaction with their current 3PL provider.

content.body:
Sahana is amazing, very professional and easy to deal with.
App is easy to use and has been trouble-free since we signed up a year ago.

classification.summary: Satisfied customer praising Saltbox's professional service, user-friendly app, and reliability over the past year.

content.body:
Honestly the transition to a 3PL was not easy nor quick. However since we found Shipmonk we felt confident Shipmonk could take us to the next level as far as of fulfillment and storage.
Our Happiness Engineer is amazing, she's trustworthy, she assist us with any issues that may arise. I'm happy to say the communication we have developed is hard to find.
In the beginning we would meet weekly until we got the hang of things, then monthly to now only if needed.
Their SOPs are within regular expectations, nothing crazy or out of this world.
I would definitely recommend using their services, I do recommend to do some research and ask as many questions, so there are no unmet expectations or surprises.

classification.summary: Customer shares positive experience with ShipMonk's 3PL services, highlighting strong communication and support, and recommends their fulfillment solution.

content.body:
I wish I could leave zero stars! Beware! The damage has already been done to our business. Do yourself a favor and look elsewhere unless you are looking for a shipping company that cannot ship!! 10+ days for fulfillment during the holidays, mispicked damage and lost parcels, inventory processing delays, the list goes on. They use OSM worldwide for their affordable pricing plan which still ends up being $14-20 for packages that we would normal ship first class for under $6. They claim free dunnage and packed with care but we had to submit claims every day for damaged deliveries.
Our customers were furious and our customer service team worked over time by the damage to our business has been immeasurable. We are no on day 12 of waiting for our inventory to ship back to us. AGAIN THIS IS A SHIPPING COMPANY THAT CANNOT SHIP!
Customer service is outsourced, slow, and just “escalates” with no resolution. I can keep going on all day with the immeasurable headache shipbob has caused.
Their management is pathetic. Their warehouse employees are lazy. This company will not last if only the truth got out.
BEWARE
*UPDATEOur inventory was returned by ship Bob. Everything was thrown into boxes, including the glass products. We filed a claim and waited 120 days they took zero responsibility and denied our claim. Shocker. We are filing a lawsuit.

classification.summary: Ecommerce brand experienced severe fulfillment failures including slow processing, mispicked items, damaged goods, and poor customer service with ShipBob, and is actively seeking alternative shipping/fulfillment solutions.

content.body: Everything about them is amazing! From my first sales call, to every onboarding call since, Shipmonk has been the most seamless and comforting aspect of my journey in e-commerce.  They are kind, helpful, and extremely knowledgeable, and they always put me at ease.  I always look forward to calls with Shipmonk reps (Shoutout to Pascalle and Charli) because I know they'll always be able to help me get my stuff sorted out especially when it seems a bit overwhelming.  Can't recommend them enough!

classification.summary: Customer is praising ShipMonk's exceptional service quality and customer support, with no indication of dissatisfaction or interest in switching providers.

content.body: My onboarding associate, Katie was excellent. She was knowledgeable about all the processes, patient with all my questions, and thoughtfully thought through my questions to provide solutions to my issues.

classification.summary: Customer praises their onboarding experience with Saltbox associate Katie for her knowledge, patience, and problem-solving ability.

content.body: Our onboarding rep, David Lowthorp, went above and beyond for us. During a chaotic time for our company - my first time using a 3PL and also our company getting ready to launch - David made sure everything on the Shipmonk side of things was seamless...he actually made it fun! I was a bit daunted by the process, but having him walk me through it, at times, step-by-step, and at all hours of the day, made things incredibly manageable and made me confident in my ability to manage future inventory deliveries and confident in our companies ability to provide a swift delivery and excellent experience to our customers. I couldn't be happier with the onboarding experience at Shipmonk, and specifically, David. If it's any indication of whats to come I know we are in excellent hands and made the right choice with this 3PL. I will definitely be recommending them to all of my friends and colleagues in need of one.

classification.summary: Customer is very satisfied with ShipMonk's onboarding experience and exceptional service from their rep, expressing confidence in the partnership for future growth.

content.body:
We formerly were using Stamps.com before making the transition to Easyship. They have truly built an easy to navigate interface and make it extremely simple to use, effective way for our warehouse team to ship hundreds of orders every day.
We've been using them for over 2 years and love the 1 on 1 business relationship we've developed with our customer service managers to help us navigate any issues that develop as well as learn about new features coming to the platform.  Our first CSM helped us establish the process of creating pick lists to help picking/packing become so much faster and efficient.
We definitely recommend Easyship to all businesses looking to simple their mass batching and shipping processes. They truly live up to their name by making this an easy daily process for our warehouse staff.  Thank you to Easyship, and our CSM rep, Conor, for always helping overcome any obstacle that comes our way and and make shipping our products a breeze.

classification.summary: Customer is praising Easyship's shipping platform and customer service for improving their warehouse efficiency with pick lists and mass order processing.

content.body:
We transitioned to Easyship from Shipstation and it's made shipping so much easier for our warehouse staff. The setup was very simple and interface is very easy to navigate.
The one problem we had was you had to create a shipping rule literally for every thing whereas Easyship natively handles most of the heavy lifting for you with it's rate shopping to easily help find the cheapest shipping option as well as the ideal package size (previously in Shipstation we had to create 10+ shipping rules to get this to run anywhere close to Easyship's automation).
We also thoroughly enjoy having the live chat customer service if there's any challenges along the way as well as our customer service manager, Conor, has been invaluable in helping us overcome a couple small challenges in the set up process. Conor was extremely quick to reply with any of our email inquiries and helped us bring a resolution quickly from the Easyship team.
We give them 5 stars all the way for living up to their name, Easyship, as it's saved so many headaches for our shipping team to get our shipments out quickly and easily.

classification.summary: The Grind Athletics successfully switched from Shipstation to Easyship and is satisfied with the simplified shipping automation, better rate shopping, and responsive customer service.

content.body: ShipMonk has been fantastic at providing fast an accurate order fulfillment for our team. We appreciate their customer service department's quick attention to our questions as they arise. We also are happy with their special projects team's help in kitting items and processing SKU transfers. They are fast and efficient. Thank you ShipMonk!

classification.summary: Current ShipMonk customer praising their fast and accurate fulfillment, responsive customer service, and special projects support.

content.body:
transitioning to a warehouse from in house fulfillment was a really huge step for my business. searched for a long time to find the right fulfillment center that checked all the boxes for Wild Woods.
initially it was a huge learning curve for me - im not very tech savvy so some of the onboarding process was challenging for me to understand.luckily I was able to contact a shipmonk team member very easily every time I would call in. they answered all of my questions, screen-shared with me,  & walked me through certain processes I didnt full understand.
recently we have decided to sell on amazon, and I was worried it was going to be a really difficult process to have our invnentory split between shipmonk and FBA but after speaking with customer service at shipmonk they explained everything and the process is really quite easy. shipmonk is familiar with amazons receiving guidelines and all I have to do is submit an order and add to the notes that its going to an amazon warehouse and they literally take care of the rest. I am really impressed!!
matthew scherer has helped me immensley, he is very in depth when explaining things- always gets back to me right away with email and has just been a blessing in helping me anytime I have needed it!  amanda jones,  & sarah box have also been a huge help in various requests I have called in about.
I am really happy with our choice to go with shipmonk. now that I understand the system on a better level, everything is easier and more fluid.
thanks guys!

classification.summary: Wild Woods is satisfied with ShipMonk's fulfillment services and customer support as they scale their business to include Amazon FBA alongside their existing warehouse operations.

content.body: We have been using Shipstation for over 5 years with great success and have even recommended it to anyone that asked...  Unfortunately, they just made some updates that broke their system...  Need to update an address or an order in shopify?  That update might not make it to shipstation... ever.  I tried reaching out to their support team, and they did reply and saw the problems, but they just blame Shopify...  It sounds like their developers need to update their integration again so it actually works for ALL of their customers.    Additionally they now charge an additional fee ($30 in our case) to use our own carrier account...  seriously looking to move on from them...

classification.summary: Long-time Shipstation user is actively looking to switch due to recent system integration failures with Shopify and new carrier account fees.

content.body: My interactions with my Shipmonk Happiness Engineer Ryan are always pleasant and efficient. Although we work in different times zones I appreciate his attention to detail and timely responses to all my queries.

classification.summary: Customer is satisfied with ShipMonk's service and their happiness engineer Ryan's responsiveness and attention to detail across time zones.

content.body: Shipbob is an absolute nightmare.  I have never dealt with a company with such poor customer service.  It takes weeks to resolve issues that are mistakes on their end.  We have had consistent issues with them entering significantly incorrect product dimensions and weights.  This has resulted in customers being quoted shipping rates 5-8 times higher than they should be.  To make it worse, their customer service is taking weeks to fix each issue.  The most recent issue took 6 weeks, just to get them to correct incorrect product dimensions (customers can't edit product dimensions or weights).  For anyone considering using Shipbob, I would strongly encourage you to look at alternative options.

classification.summary: Passion Resources is actively looking to switch from ShipBob due to repeated product dimension/weight errors causing overcharged shipping rates to customers and unacceptably slow customer service resolution times.

content.body: The team, answered all my questions kindly and easily. Instructions were clear they were easy to reach, and above all provided me with the best experience in 3PL industry unlike any other. Thank you once again Katie for your professionalism and kindness

classification.summary: Satisfied customer praising Saltbox's exceptional service quality, responsiveness, and team professionalism compared to other 3PL providers.

content.body: AVOID SHIPBOB LIKE THE PLAGUE! They catfish you wish low shipping fees (at first my average cost to ship sat at around $7), and storage fees - however every time they receive a new shipment they give a NEW pick spot and NEVER consolidate, so you pay triple in my case in some instances.... the method of working out shipping fees magically changed after 6 months, doubling my shippings. Despite this - You cannot get your stock out without crazy costs and they will not allow you to pick up, you must pay to have it shipped at their exorbitant costs (which is the reason to move away in the first place). Customer service is awful (based in India and impossible to have a phone call with anyone. They advertise there is a chat service and number, but these are rarely manned and the chatbot is useless. I know 4 other brands who have fallen for Shipbob's over-promising/under-delivering sales pitch and all have either moved or are in the process of leaving. The biggest mistake this financial year was onboarding ShipBob.The one thing they do well is pick/ship quickly.

classification.summary: Brand is actively leaving ShipBob due to deceptive pricing practices, lack of inventory control, poor customer service, and exorbitant exit costs, and is seeking an alternative fulfillment partner.

content.body: Seriously the worst fulfillment company on the planet! At first, they attract you with low shipping fees and suddenly they increase the shipping fees! At first items were charged based on actual weight, the shipping fee is 7$.  now they are charged on dimensional weight! An magic wand shipping costs like $70!!!! How ridiculous is that!!! Their US shipping fee is a lot higher than direct ship from China. 17USD for 300G , I do not know how many business can be profitable on this.   Shame!

classification.summary: Customer is frustrated with a fulfillment company's sudden shipping fee increases and dimensional weight pricing structure making their business unprofitable.

content.body:
There is some good, and a lot of bad with this company.
Good: They ship orders promptly. They integrate with a lot of different ecommerce service providers.
Bad: Their shipping prices are ABSURDLY high. Shipping shoes from Texas to Colorado with ShipBob is $46. With Shopify Shipping it's $10. I cannot ask my customers to pay that much, so I have been eating about $18 of shipping on every sale. Storage - they talk about $40 per pallet and a price for shelves, without telling you how much can fit on a shelf. I can fit all my inventory on 22 pallets. So should be $880, right? But they are storing it on shelves and charging me $2600 a month. When a customer returns an item, shipBob takes 10 days AFTER IT ARRIVES, to even acknowledge arrival, much less inspect the product. Customers cannot wait that long for refunds or exchanges so I am processing those all manually early, taking the risk of damaged product. They use sketchy shipping subcontractors that leave your product sitting in a warehouse for a month on the regular. They lose packages in their own warehouse before pickup and blame the carrier. I am moving all my inventory out as we speak.

classification.summary: Customer is actively moving inventory out due to excessively high shipping costs, unclear storage pricing, slow return processing, and unreliable shipping subcontractors.

content.body:
My experience with Avi as our Onboarding Expert for the Shipmonk was nothing short of exceptional. From our very first interaction, Avi demonstrated a unique blend of professionalism, knowledge, and interpersonal skills that made the entire onboarding process seamless and enjoyable.
Avi's in-depth understanding of the Shipmonk platform and its integration with Shopify is truly impressive. He possesses a granular understanding of the platform's features and capabilities, and he was able to translate this knowledge into simple, easy-to-understand terms for our team. As a result, we were able to get up and running on the platform quickly and efficiently.

classification.summary: A satisfied customer praising ShipMonk's onboarding expert and platform integration with Shopify, but this is a positive review of a competitor, not relevant to Saltbox's services.

content.body: My experience with Joan was fantastic. Answered all my questions and made the onboarding process smooth and really easy.

classification.summary: Customer praising Saltbox employee Joan for excellent onboarding experience and responsive service.

content.body:
As a user experience there is many way this can be improved such as the user experience and the billing layout.
The charges are way high which makes us rather find our own courier than keep creating shipping labels here, especially there is so many hidden charges that keep occurring makes us do not want to keep using Easyship and may opt to use a different platform.
Customer service is very bad which most of the time that can't solve any enquire and they say they get back to you which they don't which can be disappointed as i have to go back on the live chat to chase for an answer and also you should implement as call centre too rather just and online CS which doesn't help much.
Overall experience is bad and not ideal as many improvement is needed in many areas.

classification.summary: Customer is actively seeking to switch from Easyship due to high hidden charges, poor customer service responsiveness, and overall poor user experience.

content.body: Props to DAVID! he´s been more than awesome, great onboarding process ;) super helpfull even in areas that were not his

classification.summary: Customer is praising Saltbox's onboarding process and David's exceptional customer service support.

content.body:
I recently started with ShipMonk for my e-commerce fulfillment needs, and I was very impressed with the onboarding experience. The ShipMonk team was very helpful and responsive, and they made the process of setting up my account and getting my products into their fulfillment centers very smooth.
The onboarding process begins with a comprehensive overview of ShipMonk's services and features. This is followed by a series of hands-on workshops where you learn how to use ShipMonk's software platform to manage your inventory, process orders, and ship products to your customers.
I found the workshops to be very informative and helpful. The ShipMonk team was always available to answer my questions, and they were patient and understanding when I didn't understand something.

classification.summary: Customer is praising ShipMonk's onboarding and fulfillment services with no indication of dissatisfaction or intent to switch providers.

content.body: They almost have worse service than Shopify. Almost. Not worth the ever-increasing-amount of money. Better platforms for cheaper. Wish the FTC would stop Auctane from buying up all their competitors, gutting the service and jacking up the rates.

classification.summary: Frustrated customer criticizing poor service and rising costs, considering switching to cheaper alternative platforms.

content.body: Terrible app.  We often have issues with orders not uploading.  ShipStation Support can take days to begin investigating issue.  Huge headache!

classification.summary: Frustrated with ShipStation's app reliability and slow support response times for order upload issues.

content.body: Very very buggy. Used to be great. If anyone can recommend an alternative please do so. This software is a mess.

classification.summary: Customer is actively seeking an alternative fulfillment/software solution due to severe quality degradation and bugs in their current platform.

content.body: I used ShipStation for years and it worked well. Recently they changed their Shipsurance to Parcel Guard. When I agreed to using it, ShipStation stole the balance I had in Shipsurance. I contacted support and they did not acknowledge the problem. They claimed it was transferred to my stamps.com account, but upon running a report I did not see the added money. Thus they STOLE my balance. I assume others had this happen and SS likely made a lot of money. I canceled the app and now use PirateShip which is a pay per label deal with NO monthly fees.

classification.summary: Customer switched away from ShipStation due to alleged loss of account balance during insurance migration and poor support response.

content.body:
As a large subscription box business, our 3PL needs can vary greatly and often require a deep level of understanding of the fulfillment process.
Fernanda, our Shipmonk support representative, has been invaluable in suiting our business needs. The knowledge and background that she brings to our team makes a night-and-day positive impact on our 3PL experience.

classification.summary: Loot Crate is satisfied with their current 3PL provider (ShipMonk) and praising their support representative's expertise in handling their variable subscription box fulfillment needs.

content.body: Our Happiness Engineer is always professional and quick to answer all questions, very efficient with explaining all policies and procedures.

classification.summary: Liberty Health Supplements is praising Saltbox's customer service quality and staff responsiveness.

content.body: Horrible experience, constant issues with the log-in and with orders not uploading. Perfect example of an app that was good until the startup was purchased by a bigger company.

classification.summary: Customer is frustrated with persistent technical issues in their fulfillment platform (login and order upload problems) following an acquisition by a larger company.

content.body: Shipmonk delivers excellent DTC fulfillment support and we are fortunate to have a team that is well-versed in our business. They have prompt responsiveness, and deep account knowledge, and handle our requests with the utmost attention. Wholesale and FBA fulfillment needs improvement.

classification.summary: BruMate is satisfied with ShipMonk's DTC fulfillment but frustrated with their wholesale and FBA capabilities, indicating room for improvement in those service areas.

content.body: Shipmonk customer service is second to none. With no previous experience in logistics I was a little concerned with how the process may turn out, but their customer service have had prompt answers to any concerns. Wether by email or phone, there is always a kind someone on hand to help! Thank you, Shipmonk

classification.summary: Satisfied ShipMonk customer praising their responsive and helpful customer service.

content.body: I have had absolutely amazing experience with ShipMonks' onboarding team. I am not a technical savvy and it was not easy for me to integrate the Shopify and other online stores. But their team provided outstanding support and help, immediate response. If your assistant will be Mr. Fernando Acuna - you are the luckiest person and you are at trustworthy hands who will lead, help, and support you as long as you need him.  Good luck!

classification.summary: A satisfied ShipMonks customer praising their onboarding team and support quality, particularly highlighting Fernando Acuna's assistance with Shopify integration.

content.body: Shipmonk has been an amazing partner with us for the past few years. They continue to develop and improve upon both their WMS and on-the ground operations and take our concerns seriously. Highly recommend

classification.summary: Customer is praising ShipMonk's WMS, operations, and responsiveness as a long-term satisfied partner.

content.body:
Love everything about Easyship!!  Makes my day al lot easier to print and justget through or collabs very fast.
Customer service is always there a click away.  Totally recommend!!!

classification.summary: Satisfied customer praising Easyship's fulfillment speed and customer service support.

content.body: ShipHero has been an amazing partner for us. We launched with them back in 2021 when we migrated to Shopify and have used them as our Warehouse IMS/OMS. They have many advanced features that have helped us become much more efficient in our warehouse operations. We recently started also using ShipHero in our Shopify POS stores as well as their 3PL's on the East Coast. All of it has work seamlessly and easily enabled us to become an OmniChannel business.  If you are an Ecommerce brand that owns and operates its own DC, I can't recommend ShipHero enough.

classification.summary: A satisfied ShipHero customer is praising the platform's advanced features and seamless omnichannel capabilities, not expressing any need to switch providers.

content.body:
We've been using Shipmonk for some time now and our rep, Michael has been great! He's proactive in bringing any cost saving opportunities to us and goes above and beyond for our account by making himself available at all times of the day for any questions or concerns.
Looking forward to our long-term partnership with Shipmonk!

classification.summary: A satisfied ShipMonk customer praising their representative Michael and expressing commitment to their long-term partnership.

content.body: Such a wonderful experience in my onboarding with the team at Shipmonk! They made sure that all my questions were answered and promptly. I recommend them for any e-commerce platform.

classification.summary: Customer is praising ShipMonk's onboarding and service quality, indicating they are satisfied with their current 3PL provider.

content.body: My Etsy small business has been integrated with ShipMonk about three months ago and I have had nothing but a great experience. The onboarding process was complicated but thanks to the Onboarding Associate Katie Foss who is very knowledgeable, patient, and professional it went smoothly as well as shipping and ordering since then. Katie was very helpful with pricing and rates when it came to loading inventory on initial shipments.I integrated my Shopify store just a day ago. The integration team, especially WILLIAM BIELEFELD was very helpful with a very quick response time, careful explanations, and guidance.I would definitely recommend ShipMonk to small businesses. Their platform is reliable and comprehensive. Thank you ShipMonk team!

classification.summary: Customer is praising ShipMonk's fulfillment services and onboarding process, with no indication of interest in switching providers.

content.body: After researching many different 3PL providers, I decided to go with ShipMonk for my order fulfillment. From the beginning, they have always been extremely easy to work with and attentive. Their customer service has been top notch and I am really impressed by their technology platform and how it easily connects with my Shopify Store. Their facilities are great and the robots are very cool to see in person! Highly recommend ShipMonk as your 3PL provider.

classification.summary: A satisfied customer is recommending ShipMonk as their 3PL provider after researching multiple options and praising their service, technology, and facilities.

content.body: I've worked with Shipmonk for over 3 years now . We switched over during peak season which could have been a total mess. Integration was smooth and painless. Ever since then, we love how responsive they are with any issues that rise up. We identify, locate the root cause, fix and move on.We have dedicated happiness engineer who is assisting us in all aspect and giving best top notch customer experience. we love the services of shipmonk.

classification.summary: A satisfied ShipMonk customer is praising their 3+ year partnership, smooth integration, responsive service, and dedicated support team.

content.body: Great customer experience provided by Antonio! He is great! He really understands what has to be done in order ensure everything is working correctly. He takes the extra mile to make sure we are getting the best service.

classification.summary: Customer praising Saltbox employee Antonio for excellent service and going above and beyond to ensure quality fulfillment operations.

content.body:
Have been using EasyShip, happily, for over a year - until they out of the blue changed it to where printing on a 4x6 label is no longer free, and is now apart of their $30 subscription package.
Looking into a replacement shipping service as we speak.

classification.summary: Long-time EasyShip customer is actively searching for a replacement shipping service after EasyShip eliminated free 4x6 label printing and bundled it into a $30 subscription.

content.body:
The app works great when it works, but when it glitches and your shipping company charges you 30,000 for labels that were made by mistake, Shipstation is dismissive and slow to respond, let alone correct the issue.
Very very dissapointed in their level of service.

classification.summary: User experienced a costly billing error from Shipstation and is frustrated with their unresponsive customer service and slow issue resolution.

content.body: If you do a high volume of orders this is NOT the software to use. We are supposed to be processing 2k orders per day right now, however our scale connection in Shipstation has been broken for ELEVEN days! A support ticket was open and escalated and then nothing. This is frequently the case, there is no level of priority to serious issues.Last year something changed in the scan to ship process which required an extra click. It took them over a month to finally come back with "That's just how the program works now".

classification.summary: High-volume seller (2k orders/day) is frustrated with Shipstation's broken scale connection and poor support responsiveness, actively seeking an alternative solution.

content.body:
We chose Easyship as a way to send international shipments. For a year we selected UPS services that showed the recipient would pay taxes, yet at the end of the year we got billed for all of these taxes.
When contacting UPS directly, we were told this was due to the declaration statement being incorrect. This is something Easyship provides electronically so we weren't aware until all of the charges came through at the end of the year.
We've contacted Easyship but they've been incredibly unhelpful, basically telling us that it isn't there fault, when clearly it is.
We now use UPS directly, as the small benefit of using Easyship is greatly outweighed by the numerous charges incurred by using them.

classification.summary: Customer experienced unexpected tax charges from Easyship's incorrect declaration statements and has already switched to using UPS directly due to poor customer service.

content.body: Amazingly easy integration with the most helpful support! This system has made us 10x more efficient. Can't rate it high enough!

classification.summary: Red Land Cotton is praising their current fulfillment system for its easy integration, excellent support, and significant efficiency improvements.

content.body: I'm a huge fan of this service and all the ShipStation employees I've talked to!This app has helped me save time and money on labels. Thank you!! 10/10 recommend!!

classification.summary: Customer is highly satisfied with ShipStation's service for saving time and money on shipping labels.

content.body: We have used Shipstation for many years now. They have recently revamped their customer service department and have been very helpful with setting up automation and integration with our Shopify page. One of the best shipping solutions in the market

classification.summary: Customer is satisfied with ShipStation's shipping and customer service integration with Shopify and is not looking to switch providers.

content.body: Great app and service! Onboarding experience was awesome, support is always helpful. Best shipping app for our business!

classification.summary: Existing customer praising Saltbox's onboarding, support quality, and shipping capabilities with high satisfaction.

content.body: The app is only as good as the company behind it and in this case the company is rotten to the core.  They can't do the fundamental aspects of shipping right.  It takes 5 days for them to take inventory in and they use the cheapest most unreliable shipping subcontractors.  Their customer service is TERRIBLE.  TERRIBLE.  The kind where you get 4 emails back from 4 different people each indicating that they are "working on it."

classification.summary: Customer is actively dissatisfied with their current 3PL provider due to slow inventory intake, unreliable shipping subcontractors, and poor customer service, and is looking to switch.

content.body:
Customer service is non-existent.. you can NOT actually talk with anyone at all regarding any issues. I have set up two users for different logins and only one works. When we attempt to remove the other user and reload them into their platform, it states that they already exist and we can not add another user to the account, yet we pay for multiple users... The platform is somewhat easy to navigate, but the service is terrible.
I can only ship from my address... I can't put any other ship from locations into the system as it will not allow you to process orders if a different address is used from your main account address.
The system sucks! Support SUCKS YUUUUUGE D!

classification.summary: Customer is frustrated with poor customer support, user management limitations, and inability to configure multiple shipping locations within the platform.

content.body: Very good customer support and linkage to the store. Makes things much easier from a fulfillment perspective. Links well with the specific 3PL we are using.

classification.summary: Customer is satisfied with Saltbox's customer support and integration capabilities with their 3PL provider, praising how it simplifies fulfillment operations.

content.body:
The Customer Service is Excellence.
our Shiphero Agent Brandon Hoisington went above and beyond in helping integrate our shopify to Shiphero.
highly recommend their services!!

classification.summary: HITKOR is satisfied with ShipHero's customer service and integration support for their Shopify store.

content.body:
Does not integrate, does not work. App is unsupported in Shopify. I would steer clear.
I have contacted support multiple times and I haven't had any proper response, telling me that it's not their issue, or to use a work-around that is basic.

classification.summary: Customer is frustrated with a non-functional Shopify app and unresponsive support, warning others against using the service.

content.body: We have used EasyShip to scale our international shipping from one location in Australia to now running shipping out of Australia, EU and US. While there are always hiccups, the great customer support has meant if we run into trouble problems get solved quickly. We had no e-commerce experience when we started out and feel grateful we had a partner in Easyship that had the patience to help us scale up.

classification.summary: A satisfied customer testimonial about successfully scaling international shipping operations across multiple regions with strong partner support.

content.body:
We have been using Easyship over a year. It has been helpful for us and  easy to use.
Their customer support has always been helpful as well. There is not a perfect app for everything. Of course sometimes there are bugs, missing parcels and shipment adjustment fee. Customer service do alwasy reply and try to help us the most they could.
In all, very little complain. considering how handy this app has been for our business. Do recommend a try to see if it works for you.

classification.summary: Satisfied long-term Easyship user praising the platform's ease of use and customer support despite minor occasional issues.

content.body: not working not working not working not working not working not working not working not workingnot working

classification.summary: Customer is expressing severe dissatisfaction with a product or service that is not functioning properly.

content.body:
I would not recommend Shipstation due to their lack of technical support resources. The customer support reps do the best they can, however, when it comes to any issue that is slightly technical it can take weeks so find a solution.
Shipstation defaults to: "it's been escalated to senior support" — however we have yet have an issue resolved once it reaches this stage. At this stage there is no visibility or transparency to the status of the issue, or the time it which it will take to find a resolution.

classification.summary: Customer is frustrated with Shipstation's inadequate technical support and lack of transparency when issues are escalated to senior support.

content.body: We has been using Easyship for 8 years. Easyship is a friendly app for users with helpful functions and improved every year. The account manager is responsive and knowledgeable!

classification.summary: A satisfied long-term Easyship user praising the platform's functionality, continuous improvements, and responsive account management.

content.body: Our shipping process have been greatly enhanced since we started using Easyship six years ago. Their customer service team is excellent, and we receive prompt responses from them. The platform is clean and straightforward and provides essential and useful features. They have tremendous growth potential if they take customers' feature requests and feedback seriously. All in all, very little complain. We highly recommend Easyship!

classification.summary: WooLash is satisfied with Easyship's shipping platform and customer service, though they suggest the company could improve by prioritizing customer feature requests.

author.name: Highway Max - Colored Smoke Tires USA
author.company: Highway Max - Colored Smoke Tires USA

content.body:
It must be easy for customers to do business with you. Easyship has provided a fantastic integrated freight solution that makes transactions simple and fast. This has helped take our business to new markets and helped us grow significantly.  Highly recommend
Update** - costs to ship globally have gone through the roof, EasyShip still provide  extremely competitive pricing, which allows us continued growth on a global scale.

classification.summary: Highway Max is a satisfied customer of Easyship praising their integrated freight solution for enabling global growth and competitive pricing.

content.body: We have used ShipStation for years, and depended upon it for fast efficient labels. Since Shopify rolled out "Locations," we have been able to print to either warehouse and "change" the location in Shopify each time. Suddenly ShipStation no longer does this. Its been a couple of weeks now, and I have to manually change the location the inventory is pulling from in Shopify. We get 100 - 200 orders per day. Support has moved from "escalating to the dev team" to actually trying to gaslight me, claiming that what I say ShipStation has done for years has never been possible.

classification.summary: Multi-warehouse wine retailer frustrated with ShipStation's recent failure to support location-switching functionality and poor customer support response, managing 100-200 orders daily across warehouses.

content.body:
Easyship guided me throughout the whole process of using the app, so we received a lot of support and help from them which helped us a lot.
It's reduced any need for manual processes and I really like that it updates the Shopify platform with all the tracking information and status'. This way it's all up to date in real time, user-friendly to start-up company!

classification.summary: A satisfied user praising Easyship's support, automation capabilities, and real-time Shopify integration for their startup operations.

content.body: While the app isn't without it's issues, it has been very good for us. It has all the features we need plus some since we ship so many varying sized products. Their customer support has always been solid as well. All in all, very little complain about especially considering how necessary this app has been for our business.

classification.summary: Satisfied customer praising their fulfillment app for handling diverse product sizes and reliable support despite minor issues.

content.body: I find this platform to be very buggy, it goes down a lot and shipments go missing often. It's a very frustrating experience.

classification.summary: Customer is frustrated with platform reliability issues, frequent downtime, and missing shipments but has not indicated intent to switch providers.

content.body: ShipStation is one of the best shipping software you could find in the market. We use it on a daily basis, works very well with Shopify stores. With the scan / verify feature, we reduce our mis-ship rate gradually. Will definitely recommend to all Shopify users.

classification.summary: Customer is praising ShipStation's shipping software and its integration with Shopify, highlighting reduced mis-ship rates.

content.body: We have been absolutely blown away by the service that we received when learning about SH and ultimately going live with the product earlier this year! Our Solutions Specialist, Alissa Williams, was incredible and always replied to our needs within minutes, even when on vacation! We love how customizable the system is and have already been able to save a ton of time and money with switching to ShipHero! We would highly recommend this product to anyone looking to make the switch to a system that adapts and learns with you!

classification.summary: Ugmonk is highly satisfied with ShipHero's customizable fulfillment system and excellent customer service, having already switched and achieved time and cost savings.

content.body: Has taken 48+ hours to get back to one of my tickets. I'm left in the dark with support not answering my question

classification.summary: Customer is frustrated with slow support response times (48+ hours) and lack of communication on ticket resolution.

content.body: Good... when it works.We constantly have issues due to updates. They change things that dont work as well for us, then we have to change how we process our orders.Right now, our orders will not even import to ShipStation and they can't tell us why.

classification.summary: Customer is frustrated with frequent platform updates that disrupt their order processing workflow and current inability to import orders to ShipStation.

content.body: Easyship is a great addition to our shipping solutions. We receive timely responses, and their team is a pleasure to work with. Their dashboard is straight forward, useful and it gives you access to automations, configurations, and metric analysis. All very helpful tools to have on the back-end of an e commerce site. Truly recommend!

classification.summary: Customer is praising Easyship's shipping solutions, dashboard, and customer service with no indication of interest in switching providers.

content.body:
This is my first review ever on the Shopify marketplace after being a seller for 4 years. Never have I ever left a bad review just in general in my life as I know how hard it is to run a business and I am appreciative of other people's livelihoods. However this app needs to be completely removed from the Shopify App Store.
Do not download this app. This app, and their developer will try everything to overcharge you, they will receive the shipment, say that it was x10 heavier and send you a bill for thousands of dollars. I have contacted Shopify support to intervene in this dispute because it appears as this app is overcharging many other sellers (just read all of the reviews below mine). Will see what happens next but just believe me and stay away from these people. They use very sneaky elusive tactics to make sure they can get as much money as they can out of you.

classification.summary: Seller is warning others against using this fulfillment app due to deceptive overcharging practices and weight discrepancies, and is actively seeking to switch providers.

content.body: I'm happy so far. I used Easyship app for transition from crowdfunding to ecommerce. I guess shipping process is challenging for small start up teams by default (you are not likely to have dedicated person who knows all ins and outs) so EasyShip was great option for me. Thank you for support.

classification.summary: Small ecommerce startup found Easyship helpful for managing shipping logistics during transition from crowdfunding to full operations.

content.body:
Onboarding for SB was sleek and clean, no issues and our Implementation Specialist Lacey was super fast to respond to any questions or concerns we had - this made a big difference for us as we were new to the experience!
Thanks for you help and attention.

classification.summary: Customer is praising Saltbox's onboarding process and responsive implementation support as a new user.

content.body: We have used Shiphero for a long time. Lately, we have not been impressed with the level of customer service they offer. Many features will come out unfinished and basic functionality can be buggy.

classification.summary: Long-time ShipHero customer is dissatisfied with declining customer service quality and unfinished/buggy features.

content.body: We’ve been using Shipstation for a few years, and it completely changed our order fulfillment process. We’re an omni-channel ecommerce business and the ability to see all our orders from the different selling channels in one place allowed us to streamline our processes and improve our order fulfillment timelines. It also allows us to offer multiple shipping options to our customers without having to change the process of how we create and print the labels. 10/10 would recommend for any small business looking to fulfill orders more efficiently!

classification.summary: A satisfied ShipStation user praising the platform's ability to consolidate omni-channel orders and streamline fulfillment processes for their growing ecommerce business.

content.body: I've now been using ShipBob for a few months and overall the orders have been fulfilled accurately and on time. Like any new integration for something as complex as 3PL, there have been a few challenges - but I felt like I had plenty of support from Ankit and the team and everything was always resolved promptly, politely, and professionally. I think anyone working with a 3PL should just ensure they are doing what they can to minimize errors (e.g., send accurate receiving orders, have clearly labeled products, use barcodes, have clear product images to help with order picking, etc). That way it helps to make the overall process more efficient and reduce the likelihood for issues. I'm looking forward to continuing to scale with ShipBob!

classification.summary: A satisfied ShipBob customer is sharing their positive fulfillment experience and best practices for working with 3PLs while planning to continue scaling.

content.body: We have used them for 6 years now and couldn't recommend a better software to use for shipping. They are one of the few that works and cares about its customers and will go above and beyond for you!

classification.summary: A long-term customer (6 years) praising their current shipping software provider for reliability, customer care, and willingness to go above and beyond.

content.body: Fantastic onboarding and customer support.  Lacey was absolutely amazing to work with and greatly helped us navigate the transition as we had some complex logistics issues internally.  By far the most fair pricing I found after getting quotes from all the other top 3PL companies.

classification.summary: Existing customer praising Saltbox's onboarding, customer support, and competitive pricing after successfully navigating complex logistics transition.

content.body: The app itself works fine. However dropoffs and pickups are routinely missed and inventory is too often lost. Human interaction with the warehouse is not timely. It works fine for small parcel, but as you scale to containers and pallets you will have issue after issue.

classification.summary: Saltbox's platform works for small parcels but fails to reliably handle scaled operations with containers and pallets, with frequent missed dropoffs/pickups, lost inventory, and slow human support.

content.body: I am looking forward to never having to work with this disaster of a business again. We have issues with them on a weekly basis and their support is almost nonexistent. We have been assigned new account managers several times over the past few months. Their billing is almost always incorrect, they love to charge for made-up expenses and then not be able to provide sufficient justification for them. It seems that they have just grown way too quickly without proper infrastructure. I would not recommend working with them. They are many other reliable fulfillment centers in the US where you have real customer support and boots on the ground.

classification.summary: Customer is actively leaving their current fulfillment provider due to weekly operational issues, poor support, frequent billing errors, and rapid scaling without proper infrastructure.

content.body: The app works well except for printing problems from time to time.  However I would not recommend using their insurance - 'shipinsurance'.  The app allows you to buy insurance on an item even if it is not insurable.  I have been using the app assuming if I could buy insurance the item was insurable.  I have filed my first claim in two years and it has been denied as the shipping option was not insurable despite the fact that they offered insurance on my shipping option.  I would have chosen a different shipping option had I known this.  App needs to be fixed so that insurance is not offered on non-insurable shipping options.

classification.summary: User experienced a denied insurance claim because the app allowed them to purchase insurance on a non-insurable shipping option, leading to frustration with the product's design and functionality.

content.body: Our work together with ShipBob Ireland has been amazing so far. The app is really intuitive and easy to use. They are always there to support us with all kinds of problems that occur and resolve them very quickly. The integration with Shopify is excellent. We would definitely recommend their service.

classification.summary: A satisfied customer praising ShipBob Ireland's intuitive app, responsive support, and Shopify integration.

content.body: We have been using Shipbob in our US operations for over a year now and we recently made the decision to move the rest of our global fulfilment operations over to them too as we were so impressed with the service. Shipbob was very easy to install and has been a speedy and reliable way for us to process orders for our customers across the globe. The tracking and reporting on the order process gives me everything I need to check on each individual customer order and I am looking forward to making use of the custom features like processing delay and gift notes in future. The customer service so far has been very prompt and helpful - the team are very kind, friendly and always happy to help. I thoroughly recommend moving over to Shipbob for your fulfilment needs.

classification.summary: A satisfied ShipBob customer is publicly praising their fulfillment service and recommending them to others.

content.body: ShipBob has been the best 3PL we have used at GRJ Gloves.  We value their partnership and customer service very much.

classification.summary: GRJ Gloves is satisfied with ShipBob's 3PL services and values their partnership and customer service.

content.body: We have been using ShipBob now for over 12 months and the most impressive thing has been how well it integrates with Shopify and Gorgias making both the processing of orders and handling of customer support inquiries and returns extremely easy saving us considerable amounts of time. Recently we also started selling on Amazon and the process of integrating with Amazon FBA and replenishment of inventory is also very simple and automated. If we ever had any questions or concerns about our implementation or process Ankit has been very efficient and responsive in helping us with any of our questions.

classification.summary: Customer is satisfied with ShipBob's Shopify integration, support, and recent Amazon FBA expansion but is not actively seeking alternatives.

content.body: This app is working well for me. It sends order information to Shipbob for products with Shipbob set as inventory source and sends the tracking information back. I also use it to sync inventory so that we don't oversell products. Thanks!

classification.summary: User is satisfied with their current Shopify app integration with ShipBob for order fulfillment and inventory syncing to prevent overselling.

content.body: Great communication & problem solving. The Shipbob team is always just an email away ready to help & assist!

classification.summary: Customer praising ShipBob's communication and customer service responsiveness.

content.body:
I recently started using Shipbob for my e-commerce business and I have been blown away by the ease of installation, seamless integration with Shopify, and excellent customer service. The team, specifically Ankit Gupta and Mike Rottar, made the whole process extremely easy and enjoyable.
But what really sets Shipbob apart is the speed and reliability of their order ingestion. I have noticed a significant improvement in my fulfillment times and I have complete confidence that my orders will be processed accurately and efficiently.
Overall, I am extremely satisfied with Shipbob and highly recommend them to anyone looking to improve their fulfillment process. Thank you Ankit Gupta and Mike Rottar for making everything so awesome!
- PeterAffirmation Matchdeck

classification.summary: A satisfied ShipBob customer is praising their fulfillment service, speed, reliability, and customer support in a positive review.

content.body: From start to finish, I have been supported and was guided through the entire process with Shipbob and Shopify integration by Ankit Gupta. All my questions were answered without hesitation and with honesty.

classification.summary: Customer expresses satisfaction with ShipBob's integration support and customer service quality.

content.body: ShipBob is lightyears ahead in terms of accuracy, reliability, and responsiveness compared to our previous 3PL. We used to have a fulfillment center that made constant errors on shipments, rarely responded to our queries, and lost many of our packages. ShipBob is almost the complete opposite. Their team is very responsive to requests and transparent with upfront pricing, and overall very accurate with shipments. Would highly recommend.

classification.summary: Customer is praising ShipBob's superior accuracy, responsiveness, and reliability compared to their previous 3PL provider.

content.body:
Software has powerful analyticsAlmost 100% order fulfillment rateRitesh has been a helpful account manager
Areas for improvement are investigating patterns in unsuccessfully delivered orders and improving processes to prevent the same error from happening for future orders.

classification.summary: Satisfied customer praising analytics and fulfillment performance while noting need for improvement in investigating failed delivery patterns.

content.body: Shipbob has been smoothly assisting our business in getting orders shipped out and managed via the connection to Shopify. Very responsive and Lacey has been helpful.

classification.summary: Customer is satisfied with ShipBob's fulfillment and Shopify integration services, praising their responsiveness and support.

content.body:
The app and connection is excellent. Cant say enough how much it helps to have shipbob deeply integrated into our shopify backend. It makes linking items and tracking inventory smooth.
Appreciate all that the shipbob team and app has enabled for our store.

classification.summary: A satisfied ShipBob customer praising their 3PL integration and inventory management capabilities with no indication of dissatisfaction or intent to switch.
