content.body: Keep in mind that if you use an automatic discount, the final amount won't be right in the packing slip. We have to leave this app because our customers think they are being overcharged due to packing slips being wrong about amount paid. They don't offer any solution, just this: Automatic Discounts: A discount applied at checkout that does not require the customer to manually enter a code at checkout. ‘Automatic Discounts’ from Shopify do not import into ShipStation. These discounts are a different type of discount than the ‘Discount Codes’ that would import as a line item. This difference may be why you see a discrepancy between Order Total and Amount Paid. This is not very professional.

classification.summary: Customer is leaving their current fulfillment solution due to Shopify automatic discounts not syncing with ShipStation, causing incorrect packing slips and customer complaints about overcharges.

content.body: Out of ShipStation, Shippo, and EasyShip, I have had the easiest experience getting started with EasyShip-- they are true to their name! The main things I needed to start were:1. Generating labels for 4x7 thermal printer2. Calculating live shipping rates at checkout in my Shopify store3. Clear setup of products and boxes for accurate shipping rates4. Ability to offer free shipping up to a certain amount #2 was especially huge for me as I did not want customers to get unexpected shipping prices, as I'm still learning how to ship things I am not confident yet in what my shipping rates were. I did a test shipment to myself and it was seamless, it's everything I could ask for right off the bat.

classification.summary: Customer is satisfied with EasyShip's ease of setup for label generation, live shipping rate calculation, and product/box configuration features.

content.body: Migrating to Easyship has been a boon for our business. Reliable live rates, excellent customer service and support for a diverse range of carriers and sales channels. It's streamlined our logistics process at Plyco and we're eternally grateful!

classification.summary: Plyco is praising Easyship for improving their logistics operations and has already migrated to that platform.

content.body: How switching to ShipHero transformed our business in 90 days My skincare brand BlackWolfNation.com was doing very basic in-house fulfillment using ShipStation. We grew from 20 orders a day to over 1000 in just 12 months and needed a more robust solution to continue growing. Working with Shiphero we were able to implement a receiving ASN system, warehouse locations, faster and more accurate pick, pack, and ship procedures, rate shopping, and setting up bundled components for accurate inventory. ShipHero is a very powerful out-of-the-box solution that paid for itself instantly. With the help of the Shiphero team, we then transformed our in-house fulfillment operation into ONE23 Fulfillment - a thriving 3PL business within 90-days. We now ship for many top DTC brands and are pushing out thousands of orders a day. This is an extremely scalable solution that continues to innovate and add new features. Onboarding new clients, portal access, and billing are all fantastic. Without ShipHero we never could have grown as fast as we have or had the confidence to implement it in the first place and get the most out of the platform. All I can say is we are thankful for ShipHero every day.

classification.summary: BlackWolfNation successfully scaled from 20 to 1000+ orders daily using ShipHero and launched a 3PL business, demonstrating their growth beyond initial fulfillment needs.

content.body: I have been running businesses for 30+ years, and I can say, without a doubt, that no single business I have ever worked with has damaged the reputation of my company more than ShipMonk. Make no mistake, ShipMonk is a sales company, and cares very little for their customers once they have signed you up. I strongly urge you to go back through Shopify’s reviews from 2020 and early 2021. Recently, the reviews are all “miraculously” five-stars, and do not sound authentic….sound a bit more like advertisements than reviews. Who knows, maybe these vendors have had experiences with a ShipMonk from an alternate universe. And i would not buy the "COVID, COVID, COVID, we have addressed those issues" line. A Zebra does not change its stripes. Here are my experiences…judge for yourself and beware before getting in bed with these guys. Also check out their reviews on Google. All of my experiences outlined below are well-documented, and if you check out other reviews, you will see similarly bad experiences, though maybe not in as much detail! ShipMonk’s systems are poorly designed, their internal communications are terrible, their email system is very inefficient and frustrating to use, and their customer service is atrocious, both in terms of response time, getting accurate information and maybe most importantly, attitude. It is extremely slow…be prepared to wait sometimes days for a response, which is often unhelpful or inaccurate, and then wait again for their response to your response, etc., etc. Many of their customer service reps are poorly trained, often not knowing answers to basic questions or, worse, delivering incorrect information, and it is almost as if they have been trained to take any opportunity to blame the customer for any issues that arise. All of this adds up to a terrible customer experience, a lot of frustration and stress, and often requires hours each week to sort out their mess, all the while fielding phone calls from unhappy customers due to shipping errors and delayed shipments. A fulfillment center should be taking fulfillment issues off your desk, so you can focus on your business. With ShipMonk, hours a week are spent double checking their work or trying to get them to do what they are supposed to do on time and without being asked. I was with ShipMonk for about a year and a half. They initially flat out misrepresented their capabilities to me. I see from WAMA Underwear’s review, that ShipMonk is still habitually misrepresenting their services in order to sign up new clients. Like WAMA’s, their misrepresentation to us was not discovered, of course, until all of our inventory had arrived at their warehouse. They made very little effort, or displayed any urgency, to rectify the situation, and made no offer to reduce their cost of service, which went up substantially due to their misrepresentation of what they could and could not do, and at what price. All the while, their auto-payment systems keeps pulling funds from your account, while getting any kind of solution drags on and on. I gave them multiple opportunities, and tried to work with them, to make things right, but they were clearly not interested and could not be bothered. It seems their sole focus is signing up new clients, and not providing good service with a good attitude to the clients they have signed up. They have almost an adversarial relationship with their customers, as if you are just a necessary evil to generate revenue and grow. We make and sell an exercise systems. ShipMonk sent our customers, among other things, a dress, a purse, a sweatshirt and tap shoes…yes, tap shoes. They always send you a form apology email, letting you know how they are working to see that this does not happen again…until it happens again. Mispicks, missing items and wrong sizes were also a common problem. Their time estimates for special projects are not to be taken seriously. They almost never meet their own estimate, and instead, deliver excuse after excuse. You cannot rely on their status updates to communicate with your customers, because you have no idea if they will do what they said they will do when they said they will do it, leading to upset customers who rightfully blame you. The costs they charged us for special projects were grossly over-charged, and only after I discovered them and brought it to their attention, did they acknowledge as much. To this day, it is not clear to me whether we were ever refunded the overcharges, and we spent months, yes months, just trying to establish a fair charge for the work (we decided to leave before that was resolved). They provide very little transparency in regards to their costs and pricing…you have to dig into their reporting for the information. Though they have many shipping options, they are rarely the most cost effective. Since leaving, we have found significantly cheaper and more cost-effective rates, faster shipping and improved reliability. The attractive shipping options they quote are before carrier surcharges, which can be as much as 50-80% of the shipping cost itself. They partnered with several carriers during our time with them, who were flat out incompetent, lost packages, did not provide adequate tracking, etc. And ShipMonk will not allow you to follow up on your own to get tracking updates from carriers directly, so you must suffer through waiting for ShipMonk to follow up, which takes up valuable time and rarely delivers any actionable information. ShipMonk does not seem to understand, or more likely does not really care, that they are representing you, their customer, in the marketplace. When they screw up, or take days to get back to you, or ship tap shoes to your customers, the customer does not blame ShipMonk…they only know that you screwed up their order. Such is life with ShipMonk. I hope you find this information valuable. I thought it was important to share my experience in detail with you, to expose what I believe to be a very poorly run and untrustworthy company in the fulfillment space. There are plenty of fulfillment companies in the marketplace, and if you do your homework, you can likely find ones who pride themselves on customer service, and doing their job competently as an integral part of your business. And if something does go wrong, will give it and you the attention you deserve. In our experience, ShipMonk is not one of those companies. They are a sales company trying to grow as fast as they can, and you, as their customer, are of little consequence.

classification.summary: Long-time business owner is actively warning others away from ShipMonk due to poor systems, terrible customer service, slow response times, and significant damage to their company's reputation.

content.body: it's perfect. Easy to use, meet all my need, friendly and timely support, plus, keep adding new function

content.body: Shipstation has made our daily process in our warehouse streamlined and more efficient. We have saved so much time since switching!

content.body: Overall we are very pleased with Shipstation and it is far above any other shipping program we have used. We use several different shopping channels and Shopify Ecommerce website. Shipstation does a good job of allowing us to view and fulfill our orders. One or two suggestions that would make our experience better. 1. The ability to place a QR code on our packing slip so that customers could scan and provide a review on our respective sales channels. 2. Would prefer reduction in frequent changes in UI of Shipstation sometimes disrupts our settings. These updates / changes come with little warning, and disrupt our process. Overall Shipstation does a great job and would recommend to others.

content.body: Outstanding customer service, great support, makes our business possible. I don't know if our company could function without it.

classification.summary: Possum Creek Games is highly satisfied with Saltbox's customer service and support, which they view as essential to their business operations.

content.body: I've found ShipStation to be very reliable and basically easy to use. I'm using it to ship orders from Shopify, Etsy, and Amazon, plus manual orders. I ship within the USA and internationally. ShipStation has tools that I haven't even used yet, so I know there are capabilities that I haven't explored. I have the most difficulty setting up the rules and automation to do exactly what I want, but I'm probably doing something wrong. ShipStation does save me time and it automates communication to customers. This software has made it easy to track down lost packages too.

classification.summary: The Cat Ball is satisfied with ShipStation's reliability and time-saving features but has minor difficulty with rules and automation setup.

content.body: We decided switch to ShipHero with the main goal of consolidating Inventory Management, Scan & Pack and Shipping into just one tool. We are very pleased with the results so far as ShipHero has positively impacted our productivity and inventory accuracy. With that said, The most value I have gotten from the switch has been their customer support, Mike was great getting us started during the onboarding process and Cathy is always there for us with outstanding support and availability. Thank you guys!

classification.summary: Starpil Wax switched to ShipHero to consolidate inventory management, scanning, packing, and shipping, and is satisfied with the improved productivity, inventory accuracy, and customer support.

content.body: We use ShipStation for all of our domestic shipping. I like that the interface has all the info we need, and it works well for batch processing. We use our own shipping rates (not ShipStation's).

classification.summary: Customer is satisfied with ShipStation's interface and batch processing capabilities for domestic shipping and uses custom shipping rates.

content.body: Fantastic! Loved using this app. It helps us coordinate seamlessly with our fullfilment team; taking a huge weight off of our shoulders.

content.body: I've just started to use Easyship for my Shopify store. While I'm still new to it and figuring it out, the support has been great! I'm so glad that I have been able to set up support calls on the same day (in the same hour) and had my questions/issues resolved really quickly. Recommended, thanks!

classification.summary: User is satisfied with Easyship's fulfillment services and responsive customer support for their new Shopify store.

content.body: Newbie to ShipStation. So far, so good. I'm loving it. Phenomenal App for my business site, www.CBDTroubleshoot.com. Very easy to use. Tracks shipping data, ect... Quick and easy. I recommend this app for your shipping and tracking needs.

classification.summary: A satisfied new ShipStation user praising the platform's ease of use and shipping tracking capabilities for their CBD ecommerce business.

content.body: Shopify and ShipStation work together beautifully for our application. The orders come in automatically from our Shopify store and the shipping effort is as as low as it can be. Literally a few minutes and your label is being printed and you're done. We are very happy with it. If there was any place that ShipStation could possibly be a little better is in shipments out of country (Canada mostly) but that's probably because we ship there infrequently and always seem to pick the "unavailable" UPS international instead of UPS Standard. Not a big deal though.

classification.summary: Customer is very satisfied with ShipStation's integration and speed but has minor friction with international shipping options to Canada.

content.body: Shipstation user of over 7 years and couldn't imagine doing business without them! Excellent customer service, and the platform offers tons of intuitive, useful capabilities that make everything run more smoothly!

classification.summary: Long-time ShipStation user praising the platform's customer service and intuitive features with no indication of switching providers.

content.body: Love ShipStation. Its easy to use and keeps all my shipping data organized and easy to access.Quick and great customer service.

classification.summary: Customer is satisfied with ShipStation's ease of use, data organization, and customer service.

content.body: I really love the functionality of the app. Very stable and an indispensable tool in my daily workflow.

classification.summary: MylarPacks.com is satisfied with their current app/tool functionality and stability in their workflow.

content.body: Overall great as it pulls in orders from many different stores / platforms. The inventory tracking doesn't seem to work, but otherwise great.

classification.summary: User is satisfied with multi-platform order integration but frustrated with inventory tracking functionality not working properly.

content.body: I use ShipBob fulfillment in two stores. The system is intuitive and updated. No hidden fees. And they always introducing new centers.

classification.summary: Current ShipBob customer praising their intuitive system, transparent pricing, and expansion of fulfillment centers.

content.body: We've been using EasyShip for a couple of months. Worldwide shipping is complicated, and they made it easy for us. Application is great for handling daily sales and fulfilling batch orders (i.e., Kickstarter campaigns). It has multiple functionalities we can't live without. To name a few:* Seamless, one-click integration with Shopify (you can add many stores)* Shipping at Checkout (your customer can choose a courier, and the shipping cost is accurate). It works worldwide!* Insurance* Shipping rules (a great tool to automate shipping scenarios for different locations or box sizes)* Product listing * Simple import from file (excellent for batch orders - you can import any CSV file, and EasyShip support many e-commerce platforms * Customizable notification emails to customers In addition, EasyShip provides excellent customer and technical support (helps with couriers, customers, and the application). We highly recommend this application and other EasyShip services.

classification.summary: Luxonis is a satisfied EasyShip customer praising the platform's shipping automation, integrations, and customer support capabilities.

content.body: Works great! You can ship first class if you need to which you can't do on other platforms. Makes shipping large amounts of orders daily much more efficient.

classification.summary: Customer praising Saltbox's shipping flexibility and efficiency for handling large daily order volumes compared to other platforms.

content.body: Shipstation is great. It provides all sorts of ways to help us organize our workflow in our retail small business. We do lots of pre-orders, local pickup, and have many different staff with hands on our product. Being able to tag orders and comment within the program drastically helps our workflow. The ability to connect a scale directly to the software and weigh items is key. Plus, we can compare different carrier rates instantaneously to determine the lowest cost. With the ability to scan/verify orders via Shopify barcodes to the easy interface and ability to sort to their guaranteed best rates (I've compared), Shipstation provides the best and most robust shipping software out there.

classification.summary: Customer is praising Shipstation's shipping software capabilities for organizing workflow, managing orders, and comparing carrier rates, with no indication of switching providers.

content.body: We've had an amazing experience with EasyShip! Our Account Manager is super responsive, and the platform is easy to use for both Ops, Warehouse, and Customer Support team members. Reporting has improved so much since January when we onboarded. Would highly recommend.

classification.summary: Satisfied customer praising EasyShip's responsive account management, user-friendly platform, and improved reporting capabilities.

content.body: We've been using ShipStation for several years and the integration with Shopify is seamless. The app has robust features that scale easily based off the size of your business. It is easy to comparing shipping rates for companies like USPS, FedEx, DHL and UPS. The automation tools are robust and allow for ease when customizing a specific workflow down the employee level. After 6 years of using this product our only complaint is that users are still not able to automate package sets on shipments with multiple packages.

classification.summary: Long-time ShipStation user satisfied with the platform overall but frustrated by the inability to automate package sets for multi-package shipments.

content.body: incredible app! Makes so many shipping hassles completely effortless and the staff is ALWAYS SO helpful. Couldnt recommend it more! Truly makes running the day to day in my business so much easier.

classification.summary: A satisfied existing customer praising the app and staff for streamlining their shipping and business operations.

content.body: Cette application est très bonne! Les clients peuvent voir l'estimation des frais douaniers au passage à la caisse, ce qui les informent adéquatement des frais. De plus, ce qui est vraiment bien, c'est qu'ils peuvent payer ces frais directement avec l'achat du produit en choisissant certains transporteurs comme DHL. De plus, on peut acheter des étiquettes d'expédition pour des ventes d'autres plateformes de ventes, comme Etsy, Amazon, eBay, ce qui est très pratique. Très Très bon service client.

classification.summary: A satisfied Canadian customer praising a shipping/customs estimation app for its transparency, payment flexibility, multi-platform label purchasing, and excellent customer service.

content.body: I've used several shipping softwares and none of them have had as many features and customization as ShipHero. While we do run into some glitches here and there, it's because they are constantly working to improve the software. They are quick to resolve any issues and really listen to feature requests. The connection to Shopify is incredibly quick and accurate. This software has vastly improved our inventory management and fulfillment. The care that went into our onboarding process can't be beat. Our onboarding specialist made sure we were able to transition our processes as seamlessly as possible and helped tailor the system to our shipping requirements. Thank you Mike & ShipHero!

classification.summary: Holy Grail Steak Co. is praising ShipHero's shipping software features, customization, and onboarding support, indicating satisfaction with their current fulfillment solution.

content.body: We use ShipStation along with Shopify for shipping of our online orders. The integration is seamless and it's easy to compare shipping rates for different shipping partners like USPS, FedEx, UPS, etc. to find the most economical option or quickest delivery time. The labels are easy to print and the tracking numbers are helpful when we need to follow a package thru the delivery system. Even adding more postage to our online account is a breeze. If I could suggest anything, it would be to offer a subscription level between the 50 and 500 shipments per month level as we often exceed 50, but don't come anywhere near 500 per month.

classification.summary: Customer is satisfied with ShipStation but requests an intermediate subscription tier between 50-500 monthly shipments to better match their volume.

content.body: ShipStation is awesome, it's made a huge impact in the efficiency of our fulfillment. We use it with multiple sales channels, not just shopify, and have been very happy. The only reason for 4 stars (instead of 5) is because I couldn't find an easy way to feed live rates from Shipstation to our Shopify store based on dimensions and weight. Maybe I missed it somewhere, but we'd like customers to just pay actual shipping costs and instead we have estimates based on size/weight buckets.

classification.summary: Customer is satisfied with ShipStation's fulfillment efficiency but frustrated by the inability to integrate live shipping rates into their Shopify store based on dimensions and weight.

content.body: We've been using Shipstation for 3 years, shipping around 1000-1500 packages per year. The switch to Shipstation from manual shipping through the USPS was a quantum leap forward in efficiency. We couldn't run our business without Shipstation. Shipstation is perfect in nearly every regard except one: they aren't integrated fully with their parent company, Stamps.com. USPS international shipping options are not named the same in Stamps.com and Shipstation, which leads to confusion. I spent a few hours working with Shipstation user support to deal with the situation and it still wasn't resolved. I wish that Shipstation would change their shipping options to match the names that are officially used by USPS and Stamps.com. It's still not clear to me if Shipstation is permitting me to purchase all of the shipping options offered through my Stamps.com account (which was set up through Shipstation).

classification.summary: Long-time Shipstation user appreciates the platform but frustrated with incomplete integration between Shipstation and parent company Stamps.com regarding USPS international shipping option naming and clarity.

content.body: We have been using Easyship for over 6 months and it is by far the best shipping app we have ever used! And trust me, we have worked with over 7 major shipping services now to try and find the right fit for our business! There are many reasons we have finally found our home with Easyship, but first and foremost the user interface is beautiful and functional, and the customer service is amazing! We love the integrated shopping cart with customized carrier options for every customer, the ability to offer shipping insurance, and the focus on international carrier options. In the backend, we love that we can ship in bulk, while easily changing weight or label options for an individual order without leaving the page. It is also incredibly easy to create custom shipping rules, and the filtering options are almost unlimited! Hands down, this is the best shipping app we have ever used! :)

classification.summary: A satisfied customer praising their current shipping solution (Easyship) and explaining why it works well for their business.

content.body: ShipHero has been an integral service in supporting our brand to bring shipping back in-house. The onboarding process was straightforward and helpful. Our representative Mike Azimi is an incredible person with wonderful energy, and he guided us through the process and answered the many questions that we had. We also had the opportunity to meet Mike for an in-person training where he helped our team get up and running with the entire shipping process. After just a few weeks navigating inventory counts and bulk uploads, we’re seeing huge benefits from ShipHero and we’re on-track with our shipments processing smoothly. Big thanks to Mike and the ShipHero team for all the amazing support!

classification.summary: A satisfied customer is praising ShipHero's onboarding, support, and service quality after successfully bringing their shipping in-house and scaling their fulfillment operations.

content.body: ShipHero has been an excellent next step for us as our company rapidly grows. Most notably, the customer service they provide is top-notch. Brett Oliveira, Mike Azimi, and Cathy Galvis all were fast to respond and incredibly helpful throughout the whole process. Migrating to this app was a big task and they made it easy and painless! Even after just a few weeks, we're already starting to see huge benefits from using ShipHero and are looking forward to growing even more with ShipHero's help!

classification.summary: DFTBA is a satisfied ShipHero customer praising their service quality and migration support as they scale their ecommerce business.

content.body: I originally reviewed this store in April 2021. It's now August 2021. My experience has been consistent in the 2+ years I've been using the app. It's integration with Shopify is seamless, as is its integration with Ebay. As noted previously, it's easy to compare shipping options/prices, and integration with shipping accounts is easy. Works equally well with domestic and international shipping. When needed, customer service is quick and professional. Based on marketing emails and recommendations from various business-related sites, I've looked into other companies providing similar services, but I haven't seen any that provide services or lower costs that would justify making the change.

classification.summary: Satisfied long-term customer praising seamless integrations, competitive pricing, and reliable service with no incentive to switch providers.

content.body: During the pandemic, our business had to quickly shift to online sales by adding several Shopify Shops. We started using ShipStation from the beginning and it's been a great decision. We've been able to personalize the shipping experience from our multiple Shops through ShipStation, It's also helped us choose the most efficient shipping mode and save money on our shipping spend. We also utilize ShipStation for our returns program by sending shipping labels for RMA requests. I would highly recommend ShipStation for others looking for shipping options for Shopify Shops.

classification.summary: Customer is satisfied with ShipStation's ability to personalize shipping across multiple Shopify shops and reduce shipping costs, and recommends it to others.

content.body: My store is based in the UK and I have just invested a few hours, with the help of Joe from Easyship, to integrate it into my website. Firstly the help was second to none, thank you Joe! The early results are looking good and I'm just waiting on the right details to integrate my own carriers. I feel this will give my customers a better choice of carrier, and hopefully reduce my abandon cart rates. *** Updated - Joe disappeared and I now find the shipping rules inadequate to filter out simple needs. There also seems no way to deal with the new EU IOSS tax system.

classification.summary: UK-based store frustrated with Easyship's inadequate shipping rules, poor support responsiveness, and lack of EU IOSS tax system integration despite initial positive setup experience.

content.body: ShipStation has saved me HOURS a week in manual shipping entries. The automation rules alone have been tremendously helpful and the ability to customize labels is an added bonus. Great customer support, I'll be a happy customer for as long as I own an ecommerce business.

classification.summary: Happy ShipStation customer praising automation, customization features, and support with no indication of switching providers.

content.body: I started using shipstation about 3-4 years ago and love the integration between shopify and shipstation. You can do stand alone shipments through shipstation; as well as shipstation can give you reports on cost of shipping between any storefront used. This is my go to program and shipping rates are great and the best deals possible on ups when I can ship a package for $10 compared to $16 on other programs. Highly recommended for sure!

classification.summary: A satisfied ShipStation user praising the platform's Shopify integration, shipping cost savings, and reporting capabilities.

content.body: Stamps.com owns Shipstation and likes to make a sizeable margin on the USPS Priority Mail labels they offer through Shipstation. Do your own comparisons on rates for your shipping needs before settling on any label and shipping solution for your business -- we realized that the full cubic rates that are available to us through Shopify or Shippo are always much less expensive than what Shipstation/Stamps.com is willing to provide to small businesses that do not quality for a bulk high-volume direct contract with USPS. Likewise the UPS Air and Ground rates that were offered to us with our own UPS account through Shipstation were always significantly more than the same UPS rates available to us through Shopify or Shippo. The Shipstation UI, bulk order processing and printing, the ability to print to a remote printer with Shipstation Connect, and the customer self-service returns portal were all decent and useful over the eight years we were a Shipstation customer. There is even a smartphone app for on-the-go order processing.

classification.summary: Company switched away from Shipstation due to significantly higher shipping rates compared to alternatives like Shopify and Shippo, despite appreciating the platform's features.

content.body: App works perfectly for our needs. We have been using Shopify for years. We specifically like the item view, where you can see a thumbnail of what the customer ordered. We also like the feature that allows you to see if this is a new customer or a repeat buyer. They are attentive to customer issues, have very little down time and over all it is the best out there- (we have looked)

classification.summary: A satisfied long-time Shopify user praising their current app/platform's features and reliability with no indication of switching providers.

content.body: I like using Shipstation as standalone software but this app is just not cutting it. It's incredibly buggy and inconsistent in the rates its showing. It's super frustrating as a merchant to not be able to offer consistant and reliable live rates to our customers. Customer service is incredibly difficult to get.

classification.summary: Merchant is frustrated with Shipstation app's buggy performance, inconsistent shipping rates, and poor customer service, but hasn't indicated they're actively switching yet.

content.body: Easyship has some of the best customer service I have experienced. To illustrate, we once had the problem that we had to manually add the shipping details for our shipments from Easyship into the shopify order. After telling our customer success manager about this they programmed a solution for us within two weeks free of charge that solved the problem. They have proven to always be this responsive, no matter what the request is, and this is what makes Easyship worth the slightly higher price than for example Amazon, who would never bother to do anything with your request. It truly seems that Easyship want your business to succeed. They have also helped us in establishing a new warehouse, and resolved problems with our couriers. Would definetly recommend them to anyone looking for someone who actually does something with your requests for help. Easyship feels more like a partner than a service.

classification.summary: A satisfied Easyship customer is praising their responsive customer service and partnership approach, comparing them favorably to competitors like Amazon.

content.body: We have been using Easyship for several years and the experience has been very good. Essentially the app allows any business or person to connect with their large network of couriers, both local and international - allowing one to send packages internationally at reasonable rates. The app is well designed and easy to use. Love how seamlessly it syncs up with Shopify, customers can see the many shipping options at checkout, delivery lead time, estimated taxes/customs incurred - everything is presented succinctly. For a business, this app has been instrumental in connecting us to the rest of the world. The app continues to work on bringing added features and it is also worth to mention the tremendous customisable options on the app. Customer service has been quite prompt, more importantly our Customer Success Manager, Calvin, has been stellar and goes above and beyond to provide support and care. His genuine care for his clients definitely gives us greater confidence in the app and its services moving forward. Highly recommended!

classification.summary: A satisfied Easyship customer in Singapore is praising the platform's international shipping capabilities, Shopify integration, and customer support, with no indication of switching services.

content.body: I can't imagine doing business without ShipBob. I recommend them to everyone I meet in the eCommerce industry. The customer service is incredible, even though I rarely need it. I go weeks without even checking to see if everything is shipping properly as I've had so few issues. ShipBob is the best!

classification.summary: A satisfied ShipBob customer is praising their service quality and reliability, indicating no current need to switch providers.

content.body: Ship Bob does a good job for us. The interface is pretty easy to use and they ship on time. I would recommend them

classification.summary: Customer is satisfied with ShipBob's user interface, on-time shipping, and overall service quality.

content.body: We started using this app and it seemed great interface wise. The canadian courier prices were pretty high so it wasnt giving us the lowest rates, shopify shipping was still cheaper even though it states we get discounted rates. I've been trying to add our custom Canada post courier account, and its been like pulling teeth, the support team keeps giving me the run around.. and literally in the middle of a live chat session the support person said they had to run to a meeting and ended the chat.. so unprofessional.. what a waste. The platform is good but that is easily the worst support Ive come across and I have seen some bad ones.

classification.summary: Customer is frustrated with a shipping/logistics app's high courier rates and poor customer support, though they acknowledge the platform interface is good.

content.body: ShipMonk has been a really great partner with excellent customer service. Like everywhere, last year with the pandemic and then a blow out November/December, and then lingering effects of COVID-19 there were several unavoidable issues and delays but it is very clear ShipMonk had the leadership and strategy on how to come out of it and put in a lot of new tactics to make sure they are in a better position next year. They are continually improving and making things better which is something important with any partner. We recommend them!

classification.summary: Dang Foods is satisfied with ShipMonk's service and leadership despite pandemic-related delays, and recommends them as a partner.

content.body: Good platform and worked perfectly. Provide worldwide shipping without worrying about wrong shipping fee to our end or buyer. Customer support has been excellent in provide assist and fast response.

classification.summary: Satisfied customer praising Saltbox's platform, worldwide shipping capabilities, and responsive customer support.

content.body: My orders are totally automatic. Everytime I get a new order on my Shopify website the order is automatically fulfilled. Customer service on ShipBob is solid too. I don't have to wade through the endless amounts of complex, confusing steps and flaky cryptic customer service like with Amazon! I'm so relieved I don't have to have store my products and ship them out manually. Plus, when I do get an order from a customer on Amazon FBM (fulfillment by merchant) I have ShipBob do the fulfillment as well. Your customer, most likely, wont receive your product as quickly as Amazon, but it's really nice having my products with ShipBob where I can easily access it and be able to have a ShipBob rep help with all things fulfillment.

classification.summary: A satisfied ShipBob customer praising their automatic order fulfillment and customer service compared to Amazon FBM, though acknowledging slower delivery times than Amazon.

content.body: Love the customer service and the amount of support I received during my onboarding process! I'm anxiety-prone especially when it comes to getting started with something new and ShipMonk has been a great help...plus good vibes all around! The software is easy to use as well and has everything I need.

classification.summary: Satisfied customer praising ShipMonk's onboarding support and user-friendly software with no apparent switching intent.

content.body: This was the first 3PL we have partnered with. We initially chose to work with ShipMonk because of their experience and infrastructure with Shopify and their ability to deal with mass quantities of orders. Their onboarding process was simple and a straightforward plug-in through the app store. The App interface is very well made and has some great resources for training purposes. We worked with Kerry who has gone above and beyond in communication and transparency. Their whole team of Happiness Engineers is a major highlight of our experience. On the ground their operations exceeded our expectations. We had 5 figures in order quantity, and they maintained an error margin of around .01%. All orders were fulfilled within 2-5 days keeping our customers extremely happy. Some minor things that we would like to see improved on:Accurate up-to-date inventory counts after fulfilled orders.A more straightforward "assisted" claim process for orders with errors. Even more visibility into the receiving process.Quicker updates to billing cycle and pricing changes. Overall, we would recommend to any company who is looking for custom fulfillment specialists. Just be clear to set expectations early, and ShipMonk will deliver.

classification.summary: A Ma Maniere is satisfied with ShipMonk's fulfillment services but identifies minor areas for improvement including inventory accuracy, claims processes, visibility, and billing transparency.

content.body: Horrible experience... Stay far away! Initially, they (Erik van Bilderbeek, Jennifer Santanna & Kerry Neysmith) promised us they can do everything we asked. We sent 50% of our inventory to them. Only to find out after they received our products that their system doesn't allow them to do so. Before launching we placed test orders to ourselves to see if Shipmonk can fulfill correctly and each time they made unacceptable mistakes. We sell underwear and they literally had measured some of our underwear products with a 7 inch height. Actual height is about 0.3". Shipmonk also weighed our products incorrectly adding a 1 pound 8 ounces weight for an underwear. Actual weight is 0.2 lbs. These measurements and weights were mistakes after our complaints getting their manager, Kerry, involved and re-measuring everything. How can they be so off? How can they be so negligent!? After 3 months of consistent issues after issues we just couldn't continue with them. 3 months of time lost. Thousands of dollars lost with Shipmonk even though all the issues were clearly theirs. They do not own up to their own mistakes. We ended up having to pay for their negligence. Highly Not Recommended! Stay Far Away! Find Another Fulfillment Center!

classification.summary: WAMA Underwear is actively seeking to leave ShipMonk due to severe fulfillment errors, poor accountability, and significant financial losses over a 3-month period.

content.body: I'm still finding bugs on a weekly basis. Plus, whenever they push down an update, there's no notification. You never know when a new version is going to overwrite the old (it's web based). Nor is there anywhere you can go and find out what the latest bug fixes were. Using it is a big productivity boost, but it's simply unreliable. You don't dare print out more than 10 labels at a time, and you'd better count them as they print, to make sure none are skipped. Their current bug, is their integration with Amazon FBA. Shipstation simply refuses to see my FBA inventory accurately, resulting in me either submitting orders to Amazon FBA when there is no stock, or Shipstation will tell me that FBA has no stock, when indeed they do. They have a slick product, but they simply have very poor quality control in place, for the software updates. June 28/2021Well, here we are about a year later....Shipstation no long has the issue of printing incorrect label counts. Seems they fixed that. However, they still don't have a handle on the FBA integration. SS still reports your FBA quantities wrong, and SS also reports the FBA postage fee wrong (but only sometimes).

classification.summary: ShipStation user frustrated with frequent bugs, poor quality control on updates, and persistent FBA inventory integration issues that impact order accuracy.

content.body: Shipstation is great for keeping orders from many stores in one place. Great customer service too, very responsive!

classification.summary: Customer is praising ShipStation's ability to consolidate orders from multiple stores and its responsive customer service.

content.body: We love using ShipMonk their customer service is the best and with dedicated "happiness engineers" there are real people that can help solve fullfillment issues. They are an extention of our customer service and we appreciate their quick response times and attention to detail.

classification.summary: Customer is praising ShipMonk's fulfillment services and customer support quality, indicating satisfaction with their current provider.

content.body: Easyship is quite a good platform as we can ship to plenty of countries worldwide without worrying about no shipping solution to destination country. Customer support has some major improvement over the years in terms of response speed. The only things that need to work on is that there aren't sufficient courier to handle shipment contained battery.

classification.summary: User praises Easyship's global shipping capabilities and improved customer support but notes insufficient courier options for battery-containing shipments.

content.body: We moved to Shipmonk due the increase in volume that we were doing along with the analytics they have to offer. The communication has been well with Michaela, Kerry, and Carmen and they are always happy to help. There is a lot of self education with the software but it is typically user friendly. They were able to get 7000 orders our in 2 days for us. The only charge that is difficult to track is the additional surcharges, residential delivery fee, and fuel surcharges. These sometimes add up but they are always happy to talk it through. Very pleased thus far!

classification.summary: Frost Buddy switched to ShipMonk to handle increased order volume and analytics capabilities, and is satisfied with their service despite some difficulty tracking additional fees.

content.body: I absolutely love ShipMonk! Their seamless integration with the Shopify cart is what led me to them. From my first call to ask questions about the service, to the onboarding process these guys made me feel like I had a team working with me to get my product up on the market. My Fulfillment Consultant Brandon was there every step of the way to answer my questions even the stupid ones. Not once was I pushed off to an FAQ or a link to go find the answers on my own. ShipMonk is not just a fulfillment house; they are an addition to your business team. So if you're on the fence and searching through reviews to make sure you're making the right decision like I was, trust these are the guys you've been looking for.

classification.summary: A satisfied ShipMonk customer is praising their fulfillment service and personal support, recommending them to others considering 3PL providers.

content.body: ShipStation is easy to integrate and use with Shopify. In the past year and a half it has saved us hundreds of work hours for our small team allowing us to focus on other aspects to continue growing our business. I cannot imagine doing an online retail business without using ShipStation anymore.

classification.summary: A satisfied ShipStation user praising the platform's integration with Shopify and time-saving benefits for their small ecommerce business.

content.body: We find tremendous value in using ShipStation. We used to create shipping labels through our carrier web portals and it was very time-consuming entering information from the orders. We save countless hours using ShipStation. The integration is seamless and customizable as well.

classification.summary: Customer is satisfied with ShipStation's time-saving integration and customization capabilities for managing shipments, but is not expressing interest in switching fulfillment providers.

content.body: Unable to create shipping zone/Add Rate for Africa using the Easyship App. It just keeps buffering on the admin & nothing happens. Easyship & Shopify both party could not fix this issue. Apart from that in terms of insurance, the duty and tax features are great.

classification.summary: User is frustrated with Easyship app's technical issues preventing shipping zone creation for Africa, despite attempts from both Easyship and Shopify support to resolve it.

content.body: Shipmonk is so helpful, quick, and efficient! Their customer service is some of the best we have ever dealt with and they really are sure to treat your business as a partnership. 10/10 would recommend Shipmonk!

classification.summary: Customer is praising ShipMonk's customer service, efficiency, and partnership approach with a 5-star review.

content.body: We love doing business with Shipmonk! Their customer service is extremely helpful and friendly. We love how efficient and streamlined their system is.

classification.summary: A satisfied customer is praising their current 3PL provider ShipMonk for excellent customer service and efficient operations.

content.body: This has been a great integration with ShipBob. It was easy to onboard and integrate with our store for seamless shipping of our subscription boxes.

classification.summary: The Finer Things 1920 is satisfied with their current ShipBob integration for subscription box fulfillment.

content.body: The best 3pl for Shopify brands. ShipMonk has it all -- easy integration with Shopify, a robust feature set, an amazing support team, and warehouses that can get 99%+ of orders out the door same or next business day, even during spikes in demand. They also have the flexibility to offer custom services like kitting. Since they own and operate their own warehouses, your support representative can walk onto the warehouse floor anytime to take pictures or assess product quality. They're as close as you'll get to physically owning and operating your own warehouses.

classification.summary: A satisfied ShipMonk customer is praising their 3PL services, integration capabilities, warehouse control, and fast fulfillment speeds.

content.body: We have been using Shipmonk on our new website (a few months now) with great results. The customer service is outstanding, especially for people who don't have too much experience dealing with 3rd party fulfillers. Their platform is a bit complex, but there are plenty of resources that explain everything and the support team is always helpful in smoothing out any issues quickly and patiently explaining how to properly use the tool over the phone or email. I also really like the reporting (both for orders/fulfillment as well as costs to us) and simple pricing model, which has been exactly in line with what they showed me during the sales pitch. Couldn't be happier thus far!

classification.summary: Customer is very satisfied with ShipMonk's fulfillment services, customer support, platform resources, and transparent pricing.

content.body: I love how simple the back-end reporting is. You can also watch your orders being picked, packed, and processed in real time. They are great at turning around orders in 1 day!

classification.summary: Customer is praising Saltbox's reporting dashboard, real-time order visibility, and fast 1-day turnaround times.

classification.summary: Customer switched from a local distributor to ShipMonk and is satisfied with the improved platform usability, customer service, and faster shipping times at lower cost.

content.body: We use Shipbob for our DTC channel and really like it! The real time shipping calculator integration with Shopify has been very helpful and allows us to provide true shipping costs to our customers. Shipbob support is great, they respond quickly and our account manager is AWESOME! Their dashboard is user friendly and they are always improving it which is much appreciated.

classification.summary: Customer is satisfied with ShipBob's real-time shipping integration, responsive support, and user-friendly dashboard for their DTC channel.

content.body: Shipbob has been a great fulfillment partner as we grew our business by over 300% last year. They continued to work with us amidst our growth and worked hard to meet our demand. On the functional side, orders get synced from Shopify easily and it really runs itself after integration. My one caveat is live shipping costs from CartBob. Intuitive in some ways, but not smart enough to handle our specific needs. Overall, excellent domestic 3PL service with great customer service and a growing international presence.

classification.summary: ShipBob customer satisfied with fulfillment partner's performance during 300% growth but frustrated with CartBob shipping cost tool limitations.

content.body: Shipbob does all our fulfillment for Shopify, Amazon, and Walmart stores, and they do a great job across all four warehouses we are using at Shopbob. Their customer service is pretty amazing too. One thing they can work on is the shipping rates - which I think can be more competitive.

classification.summary: Rovectin is satisfied with ShipBob's fulfillment and customer service across their four warehouses but is frustrated with their shipping rates and looking for more competitive pricing.

content.body: Shipbob has been a great partner since we joined them a year ago. They literally saved us from a disastrous situation with a different 3PL group (I won't name names, but "RH" should give you a hint). Their support is great and quick to respond. The rates are fair. I particularly enjoy the "all-in" pricing model. And their growing network of warehouse locations, especially internationally, is really helping us to seamlessly expand our overseas operations. I would give 4.5 stars if I could. My main criticism has to do with the Shopify integration, specifically the warehouse locations. Currently, the integration is set up where ShipBob acts as the fulfillment service and does not support multiple warehouse locations. So whether you have 1 Shipbob location, 4 Shipbob locations, or multiple locations between Shipbob and other providers (we sometimes ship from our headquarters, for example), Shopify groups it all into one and really limits what you can see and do in Shopify. I've been told this is being addressed, so really looking forward to seeing this improved.

classification.summary: Current ShipBob customer praising their service overall but frustrated with Shopify integration limitations around multiple warehouse location visibility and control.

content.body: Great company with great people! We have had a really positive experience so far and can confidently recommend ShipBob.

classification.summary: Customer is praising ShipBob's service and people, expressing satisfaction with their fulfillment partner.

content.body: Great order fulfillment center and friendly onboarding support. They do exactly what they say they do

classification.summary: Satisfied customer praising Saltbox's fulfillment quality and onboarding support, with no indication of unmet needs or intent to change.

content.body: One of the worst customer support systems I've dealt with. If you're lucky they'll respond within 48 to 168hrs. Their response is usually tired and unhelpful. No live support and they'll happily ignore all requests to chat with support. Currently looking for an alternative solution.

content.body: The shipbob team works diligently and always have been a strong and important pillar of our supply chain.

classification.summary: Customer is praising ShipBob as a reliable and important fulfillment partner in their supply chain.

content.body: We use ShipBob for order fulfillment. They are a self service fulfillment operation, so as long as you feel comfortable navigating these waters with minimal support, I'd recommend them. However, after you reach a certain volume and $$ threshold, you get dedicated support. We've found the dedicated support very helpful. They just started offering 2-day delivery in the lower 48 states, so that was a big plus. We were considering using Deliverrr for the 2-day option, but they started offering this option before we made the switch. Sometimes standard shipping options are extremely delayed or never show up, (they use UPS mail innovations or DHL surepost for their standard options) but this might also happen elsewhere. International service offerings exist for Canada UK and EU. We also sell in Canada with ShipBob. As of now, they only offer Canada Post for standard and FedEx for expedited shipping. Very expensive options. The app itself works properly for us, although it would be nice to have ShipBob update inventory within Shopify. Perhaps we just haven't found this functionality yet.

classification.summary: Current ShipBob user satisfied overall but notes expensive international shipping options, occasional standard shipping delays, and missing inventory sync feature with Shopify.

content.body: Love shipbob! Best 3pl out there no doubt, very organized, user friendly and great support. I definitely recommend.

classification.summary: Customer is praising ShipBob as their current 3PL provider and recommending them to others.

content.body: Big thanks to ShipBob especially the customer support we've received since launching on their platform. It's a vast improvement from our previous distributor. Highly recommend.

classification.summary: Customer is praising ShipBob's platform and customer support as a major improvement over their previous distributor.

content.body: Wouldn't Have Made over $3,000,000 Last Year Without Shipmonk! This software has expedited the SALES GROWTH of my business by removing the headache of shipping, storing, and hiring staff to package and process orders. With this weight off of my shoulders, I can 100% focus on new product development and effective marketing to continue increasing my business' revenue. The thing I LEAST LIKE about this software is that I didn't know it existed YEARS before! I have been using this software since the summer of 2018. Before that, I was STRUGGLING to keep up with packaging hundreds of monthly orders. Fast forwards years later, we now have THOUSANDS of orders each month. Image if I was still self-packaging my own orders with our current volume. This software is a MUST HAVE for serious business owners that want to build a business that can fully operate on its own. Overall, this software is CRITICAL because it frees my time, gives me location independence to travel, and enjoy my family without worrying about packaging material, processing orders, or interacting with shipping companies. This software gives me the security and confidence knowing that I am building a sustainable business that can and does run without me needing to be present for every aspect.

classification.summary: A satisfied user credits 3PL fulfillment software with enabling their business to scale from hundreds to thousands of monthly orders, freeing them to focus on growth and operations.

content.body: Ship on was exactly what our business needed. We needed a reliable company that would handle everything for us. Once an order is placed, they pick, package and ship it our for us. It’s truly a one stop shop. The platform is pretty simple for beginners which was a plus for us. If we are ever unsure or have questions the chat button and FAQ resources are there. content.body: Highly recommend ShipBob for B2C orders. They make the process much easier, transparent, and with analytics! They're quickly expanding internationally too, so there's a lot of opportunity to grow with them. They're still building up their B2B services. If your products are not fragile or heavy and can be shipped on pallets for B2B with their shipping services, I still recommend them. Unfortunately for us, our products are fragile, heavy, and parcel only, and the B2B services wasn't a good match. We tried their service where we make our own labels for B2B orders too but it didn't work out. They're extremely good at making shipping labels for you though! Truly an automated system if you let them take over fulfilment for you.

classification.summary: Ferris Wheel Press highly recommends ShipBob for B2C but found their B2B services inadequate for fragile, heavy, parcel-only products and is seeking alternatives that better match their specialized shipping needs.
