classification.summary: ANDBOX is satisfied with their current fulfillment/app solution, praising its accuracy and ease of implementation.

content.body: Works well. Haven't had any problems linking our Shopify store. I'm happy that they introduced an optional delay so we can run a one click upsell app.

classification.summary: Customer is satisfied with Saltbox's Shopify integration and appreciates the new optional delay feature for running upsell apps.

content.body: A fulfillment service that meets the needs of our growing ecomm biz, continually expanding and improving which is great to see. Great customer service always!

classification.summary: Existing customer praising Saltbox's fulfillment service quality, customer support, and continuous improvements as their business expands.

content.body: It works perfectly and help us to concentrate on sales and marketingI highly recommend Shipbob for your fulfillment partner. Thanks Shipbob!

classification.summary: A satisfied ShipBob customer praising their fulfillment services and recommending them to others.

content.body: The app is good, but good luck if you need help from their support. We just had a simple request for them to delete our shipping carriers so that we could re-add it under a different username and password, and we've been waiting for a week now for them to respond. We can't use Shipstation until they complete our request, so we are "dead in the water" until they choose to help us.

classification.summary: Customer is frustrated with slow support response to a critical shipping carrier deletion request that is blocking their ability to use ShipStation.

content.body: All orders are shipped within 24 hours. Real time inventory tracking helps plan reorder dates. Labels are very competitive. Orders lost in transit get compensated at the retail price. Support tickets get answered within 1-2 working hours. Easy self-service integration and fulfilment discounts at high sales volumes.

classification.summary: A satisfied customer praising Saltbox's fast shipping, inventory tracking, competitive pricing, and responsive support.

content.body: I used this app to help fulfill customer orders and manage inventory replenishment, it is super easy to use and make our CS team job a lot easier. I don't have any complains so far and would recommend the APP to whoever is struggling with customer order fulfillment or wanted to improve customer satisfaction. The support team is super strong behind this app and you can get timely response when needed, the most important thing is the multiple fulfillment locations can help reduce the shipping lead time and save freight cost. The ease of the transfer inventory between locations is another important feature that I'd like to mention as well.

classification.summary: Satisfied user praising Saltbox's multi-location fulfillment capabilities for reducing shipping times and costs while improving order management and inventory control.

content.body: Shipbob are great. The process and team are super. Hugely recommended. Using Shipbob has given me back hours daily and huge peace of mind.

classification.summary: Customer is praising ShipBob's fulfillment services and expressing satisfaction with time savings and peace of mind.

content.body: Easyship has been critical to our success and growth. They have a fantastic platform that is super easy to integrate with a Shopify store. Best of all, they have an amazing team of people and are constantly asking for feedback on how to improve to make MY LIFE easier. I'm grateful for discovering this service/app every single day!

classification.summary: A satisfied Easyship customer praising their platform, integration ease, and customer-focused team with no indication of switching providers.

content.body: We've been using Easyship for the last couple of years and it is by far the easiest portal we've used to date. The UX is user friendly, visually appealing and informative at the same time. My favourite feature allows me to gauge shipping cost prior to dispatch without having to read off of a price matrix and weigh out numerous options that suit me. However, where Easyship really exceeds is its customer service. Jose has been by our side since launch and is always eager to reach out either to check up on us or help whenever necessary. Thanks Jose!

classification.summary: Customer is praising their current 3PL provider Easyship for its user-friendly platform, shipping cost transparency, and exceptional customer service.

content.body: Great APP! Literally the best if you're trying to scale your business. Customer service could be better. But overall 5 stars!

classification.summary: User is satisfied with the app for scaling their business but notes room for improvement in customer service.

content.body: This app is not user friendly at all. None of my orders would show up and I had to put them in manually. Also they have awful service and dont have live chat. Download Pirate Ship Instead

classification.summary: User is switching from Saltbox due to poor app usability, orders not syncing automatically, and lack of live chat support.

content.body: Easy to use and set up. Jose was incredibly helpful in the onboarding process. Syncs to Shopify store very easy.

classification.summary: Satisfied customer praising Saltbox's ease of use, setup process, and Shopify integration with helpful onboarding support.

content.body: ShipStation is very helpful. Shopify Order information goes directly to ShipStation and saves me so much time - time I can spend on baking cookies. I used to waste a lot of time preparing shipping information. Now with ShipStation it takes minutes and the package is ready to go. I ust wish ShipStation had is a help desk. The only way to get assistance is through email that where I may not get a response for 24 hours, or a chat that is not always available. When I'm having trouble with getting a label printed, I can't wait that long to get assistance. Otherwise, I'm extremely happy with ShipStation.

classification.summary: Customer is satisfied with ShipStation's integration and efficiency but frustrated with slow and inconsistent customer support response times.

content.body: I would like better tutorials explaining how to troubleshoot problems that arise when using multiple stores/multiple branded labels/ pick lists. My branded forms are crossing over and show up in the wrong store's printed items.

classification.summary: Customer needs better documentation and support for troubleshooting issues with multiple stores and branded labels, as their forms are incorrectly crossing over between stores.

content.body: We use this App to connect to both our eBay and Shopify Stores so we only have to use one shipping software for all our shipping needs.

classification.summary: Customer is satisfied with using a shipping software that integrates multiple sales channels (eBay and Shopify) into a single platform for centralized fulfillment.

content.body: I love using Shipstation. It integrates seamlessly, and helps me keep shipping costs down. I can easily track shipments from various selling venues, as well as my own website in one easy to use platform.

classification.summary: Customer is satisfied with ShipStation's shipping cost management and multi-channel integration capabilities.

content.body: ShipStation is absolutely vital to our online selling processes, allowing us to easily keep track of MANY orders with different kinds of complicated settings, "splitting" orders if a certain item is temporarily out of stock, keeping inventory organized, and automating the process of assigning default package and shipment settings based on items ordered or locations. It is an absolute lifesaver and saves us tons of time, energy, and money over Shopify's built in shipping options.

classification.summary: User is praising ShipStation's ability to handle complex order management, inventory organization, and automation as superior to Shopify's built-in shipping options.

content.body: I really like how easy it is to use. The integration with shopify is seamless and it's super easy to import orders. Also, I like how it integrates with my stamps.com account so you can easily add more money as soon as you run out of shipping budget without leaving shipstation.com or disrupting the current order that you're, oftentimes, right in the middle of shipping. I also like how easy it is to process returns or exchanges and how it gives me the ability to email the customer with the return label automatically OR download the label so that I can send it as an attachment in a personal email to the customer's exchange or return request. Honestly, no negative feedback and would highly recommend it to any other CPG start-up.

classification.summary: Customer is praising ShipStation's ease of use, Shopify integration, and return/exchange management capabilities with no complaints.

content.body: Excellent solution for shipping, best app in this category! We use it for more than a year, and extremely happy with it

classification.summary: Existing satisfied customer praising the shipping solution they've used for over a year.

content.body: After several years we are ending our relationship with Shipbob. They have overcharged us multiple times to the tune of thousands of dollars. Most recently, we submitted a work order to remove our few remaining items so we could close out our account. After paying for that work order, they "found" two cases of our most popular product of which we'd been sold out of for months. We relisted the item on our website and sold all but two units just in case there were any lost/damaged orders. We then submitted a disposal request for the warehouse to dispose of the two remaining 3.4 fl oz tubes of moisturizer so we could close our account. This should only cost a few dollars. Instead, Shipbob charged us $500 to dispose of two skincare products that fit in the palm of your hand. We raised the issue with Shipbob and weeks later we are still awaiting the refund...

classification.summary: Brand is ending their relationship with ShipBob due to chronic overcharging and poor customer service, including a $500 disposal fee dispute that remains unresolved.

content.body: We love this app. It has saved us so much time in doing our shipping. We love how quickly we can do shipping for all our orders in just a few clicks.

classification.summary: Customer is praising an app for streamlining their shipping process and saving time on order fulfillment.

content.body: I would highly recommend not using ShipMonk. I'm providing 2 stars because their UI is great, and the sync with Shopify is helpful so that we in theory don't have to update our inventory on a consistent basis (which in reality is not the case). If you have under 100 SKU's they may be a fit, we've been using them for a few years and everything was fine until we really starting scaling our inventory levels and SKU count. Then came receiving issues, lost inventory (and by default overselling to our customers and having to cancel orders), and sending the wrong product to our customers - as in not even inventory sold from our store (we sell dog merch, our customers have received human supplements, perfume, etc). I had to track down and reach out to the other stores separately to make sure they were aware their product (sometimes worth $100+) was being sent out to the wrong customers so they could also file claims. The lost inventory has been the biggest headache for us. When I say lost inventory I mean hundreds of units (some SKU's have a >6% shrink which ShipMonk claims is normal) that have gone missing within a few months, and no reimbursement with often what I would consider odd rational - they couldn't store everything in a single bin, therefore it's not their fault. Money drain! I will say different from other ShipMonk reviews I have mostly had good experiences with their CX team, and I think the bigger issue is that there are larger wide scale systemic issues with ShipMonk and the CX team is either not equipped to handle or they truly have no idea what happened and that's that. My negative experiences have been when agents will resolve a ticket when the issue is not fixed, so I've had to reopen tickets just to make sure they actually respond. Overall - I would keep shopping, not worth it.

classification.summary: A scaling ecommerce brand is actively looking to leave ShipMonk due to critical fulfillment failures including lost inventory (>6% shrink), wrong products shipped to customers, and poor system handling at higher SKU volumes.

content.body: i love it until it goes down or they do updates in the middle of working.for some reason i don't know why it does not pull down my shopify sales sales like it should. sometimes it does sometimes it doesn't. today shipstation pulled in a canceled sale from shopify, that was curious. other than my couple issues i love shipstation take a lot of work load off of me and helps me from making mistakes.

classification.summary: User appreciates ShipStation's core functionality but is frustrated with reliability issues including system downtime, inconsistent Shopify order syncing, and incorrect order pulling that creates extra work.

author.name: Hook, Line & Tinker - modern embroidery kits
author.company: Hook, Line & Tinker - modern embroidery kits

content.body: I have been a Shipstation user for more than 2 years. When I switched my websites (I have different sites for wholesale and retail) over to Shopify last fall, the transition was seamless - even for my slightly less than simple setup. All my orders move into Shipstation from Shopify with one click. No manual order entry, and I have the flexibility to use my own commercial shipping discounts. Even my Etsy and Faire orders move readily into Shipstation. Easy peasy, and super fast.

classification.summary: A satisfied Shopify user praising Shipstation's seamless integration and order management capabilities across multiple sales channels.

content.body: We've been using shipstation for years! There are other shipping software options out there but Shipstation has never let us down. Great software, great company.

classification.summary: Customer expressing strong satisfaction with ShipStation shipping software after years of use, with no indication of dissatisfaction or need to switch.

content.body: Their Monday morning outages are getting old. Happens way too often. Also, when you get customers, whose shipping labels show to have been paid for and printed, contacting you on a regular basis you will realize that you have to babysit this company's product. There are several threads on the Amazon Seller forum describing this exact issue, charging for shipping labels that aren't printed out. The latest glitch had occurred for over a week when using Shipstation Connect. Randomly printed out blank pages instead of Packing Slips. This seemed to occur when printing large batches. After waiting on their Chat for over an hour their poorly trained support person was zero help. Told us we should uninstall and reinstall the app & also tried to infer that it was our printer causing the problem. We have 2 printers and they both did the exact same skips. Another waste of time. We have found a workaround to avoid the missing packing slips. It takes more time but we can't continue having orders not shipped. Looking for a new option that isn't part of Shipstation or Stamps.com (the parent company). The fact that Shipstation took three weeks to respond to this clearly represents their approach to customer support.

classification.summary: Customer is actively seeking to switch from ShipStation due to recurring system outages, printing failures, poor support response times, and lack of resolution to recurring issues.

content.body: Fantastic app. Is helping us break down the barriers when it comes to scaling an eCommerce business. Their Bulk shipping feature is a necessity for brands scaling around a hero product. Onboarding is incredibly easy and painless, our representative, Mike Azimi was a pleasure to work with and maybe one of the fastest communicators via email I've met.

classification.summary: Kong Beer Bong is a satisfied Saltbox customer praising the platform's ability to help scale their eCommerce business, particularly highlighting the bulk shipping feature and excellent onboarding experience.

content.body: We absolutely love ShipStation! We have multiple shopify stores and Amazon accounts as well, the ability to sync it all into one software is a game changer! Highly recommended if you want to make shipping easy. ShipStation also has a deal with USPS to purchase postage at good rates as well. A+++++

classification.summary: Customer is praising ShipStation's ability to centralize multiple sales channels and competitive shipping rates, not expressing any need for Saltbox services.

content.body: This is perhaps among the best apps out there. We can't function without it. Not just the connections and level of service but how versatile it is. We can control our sales from our phone app, or desktop, and has all the platform connections we need.

classification.summary: Existing satisfied customer praising an app's versatility, connections, and service quality across multiple platforms and devices.

content.body: A serious lifesaver for managing all my shipments! I love that I can give my international customers a dynamic checkout which includes various shipping options and the option to pay for taxes and duties right at checkout. This really helps eliminate any surprises our international customers may be hit with on delivery and improves conversions at checkout. I also love that it works so seamlessly with our shipping carriers and that we are able to easily import our discounted rates we negotiated with carriers. To add to this, their customer service is A++++! I worked with Hiromi and she was so wonderful throughout the whole process. Anytime I had a question, it was answered within 30 minutes. She also took the time to video conference with me and walk me through the whole platform and help me set it up! Thank you thank you thank you!

classification.summary: Customer is praising their current shipping/fulfillment platform for international checkout capabilities, carrier integration, and excellent customer service.

content.body: I used this app to integrate our Shopify store with our Shipbob account to automise orders fulfillment. It works perfect!

classification.summary: Villa Cotton is satisfied with their ShipBob integration for Shopify order fulfillment automation.

content.body: I've been using shipstation for about 3 years. While works well, as you grow you see it's limitations quickly. I went from 3 shipments a day to 60 and I can honestly say, I'm not impressed. Lacking features: 1. doesn't automatically pick the lowest shipping rate if you have multiple courier accounts; 2. fails to pick up HS codes for international shipping; 3. may not pick up sale prices and country of origin for customs. Those are my 3 biggest pet peeves.

classification.summary: Growing ecommerce brand frustrated with ShipStation's limitations in automation, international shipping features, and ability to handle scaling from 3 to 60 daily shipments.

content.body: Don't even waste your time... I spent about 5 hours trying to get this app set up so I could offer calculated international shipping rates with duty quote during checkout. This included importing CSV file with all my product sizes and easyship classifications, adding all my shipping container sizes one-by-one and then paying over $800 for the annual subscription to Shopify as well as chatting with Shopify to manually turn on 3rd party calculated rates. After all that, I tried adding a couple items to the cart and checking out... it worked! But then, I tried adding a few more items and whenever I got over 10 items, the shipping calculation would say "Your cart has been updated and the items you added can't be shipped to your address. We don't offer shipping to United Kingdom" (or whatever country you might be testing) HUH?!? This is probably the worst wording imaginable. So I get a huge deal with a potential customer and they want to order 100 items and easyship tells them that we don't offer shipping to their country and I lose the customer for life?!? Who decided this was a good message? Sounds like a great way to lose business! I emailed easyship to see what is going on and didn't hear back... (In their defense, I did email on a Saturday morning, but I still hadn't heard anything at 4pm Monday). So, I opened live chat and spoke with someone who tells me that "this is a limitation of their software" and the only option is to use a Shopify flat rate shipping for larger orders. Who considers 10+ items too large of an order? So in other words, I just wasted about 5hrs of my life trying to use their app only to have it require me to go back to the way it was without the app. Again, don't waste your time with easyship... The name itself is false advertising :(

classification.summary: SimpliDock is frustrated with easyship's shipping calculation app due to software limitations that fail on orders over 10 items and poor customer support, forcing them back to basic flat-rate shipping.

content.body: We've been working with Shipbob since 2018 and there are several reasons why Shipbob has been the perfect partner. First of all, speed to scale with us, pick-pack and ship with a business growing 1200% in a couple of weeks. Second of all, the locations across the US. We sells flammable goods that need to be shipped via ground, so Shipbob has been a great ally as they have 3pls all over the US facilitating 2-3 day delivery time for any customer in the US. Specially when weather challenges happen, being able to have different 3pls to ship from, allows you to ensure you seamless supply chain.Also their advanced software help us to quickly understand shipping costs and how to improve shipping times and costs by being closer to where your customer.

classification.summary: Satisfied customer praising ShipBob's multi-location network, speed, and software for handling rapid growth and optimizing shipping costs for flammable goods.

content.body: Works great. Self-serve platforms are the standard for modern 3PLs and ShipBob is at the top. They've scaled seamlessly with our volumes, that have grown significantly over the last 3 years.

classification.summary: Hero Cosmetics is satisfied with ShipBob's self-serve platform and ability to scale with their growing volumes over the past 3 years.

content.body: The API works great, would like to have the weight of the shipment (actual vs dim), actual inventory. Also it would be nice if you when split a shipment that it updated both tracking numbers. Overall Shipbob is amazing, the above comments are all growing pains and I am guessing will be sorted out over time. Shipbob can handle the easiest to the most complex shipping issues!! Try them you will not be disappointed.

classification.summary: Current ShipBob user praising their service overall but requesting feature enhancements for shipment weight tracking, inventory visibility, and split shipment tracking number updates.

content.body: We've been using Shipbob for a year now and the service has been excellent, the automation flawless and the integration scaled with our needs. We're very pleased to work with Shipbob and they've kept up with us every step of the way as we've scaled our store, order volume and inventory variety.

classification.summary: A satisfied ShipBob customer praising their fulfillment service's automation, integration capabilities, and ability to scale with their growing business.

content.body: ShipBob is the best for 3rd party direct to consumer fulfillment. I've used them since our business's inception last year and they've always been eager to help us succeed. Their app is intuitive and user friendly and they've got all the options you'll ever need. They're growing fast too! Soon to have multiple centers in Europe!

classification.summary: Customer is satisfied with ShipBob's fulfillment services and has no apparent need to switch providers.

content.body: This app is really very good in as much as they have chosen to scan and crosslink. Some missing information would be very helpful in feeding back from this API actual cost of shipping, the weight of the shipment (actual vs dim), actual inventory.

classification.summary: User appreciates the app's linking features but needs better API data on shipping costs, actual/dimensional weight, and real-time inventory information.

content.body: We were originally really happy with their services, but the customer service has been very poor and they seem to be very unresponsive. They removed the chat option, and now emails take forever. Our recent tickets have not been resolved or answered properly. Very disappointed!

classification.summary: Customer is frustrated with declining customer service responsiveness, removal of chat support, and slow email response times, though they haven't indicated they're actively switching yet.

content.body: We really enjoy working with the ShipBob dashboard on a daily basis. For our customer service team, it's a simple way to keep track of the stage of every package (from picking, to shipping, to delivery), and to provide these details to our customers when necessary. ShipBob has also made it super simple for us to be able to file claims with carriers when we've had issues with them, and we love their carriers estimated shipping time tool (especially during peak time season). Their dashboard is easy to understand and makes changes and edits to orders simple. We've also loved working with their team, both with our team lead as well as with every customer service rep we've spoken to on the phone. Through their dashboard and analytics, we've also been able to analyze our inventory and distribution of it to our different warehouses. Overall, would highly recommend.

classification.summary: A satisfied ShipBob customer praising their dashboard, carrier management, and customer service without indicating any need to switch providers.

content.body: Great fulfillment and customer service! ShipBob is always improving the experience and looking for ways to help their clients.

classification.summary: Customer is praising ShipBob's fulfillment service and customer service improvements, indicating satisfaction with their current 3PL provider.

content.body: LOVE ShipBob. We work on the ShipBob dashboard daily, and wouldn't change a thing. Everything from fulfillment to delivery is a breeze!

classification.summary: Bloom Nutrition is highly satisfied with ShipBob's fulfillment and dashboard experience and has no intention to switch.

content.body: Switching warehouse management systems is a scary proposition. Especially when you have millions in the warehouse and are going right into the busiest season. After about 6 weeks we went from signing a contract to being live. And now after only 3 weeks on the platform we are already saving time and money.

classification.summary: Existing Saltbox customer praising the speed of implementation and immediate cost/time savings after switching their warehouse management system.

content.body: We have been using ShipBob for more than 1 year now and we are absolutely happy with their services. The dashboard is easy to use, everything automated so you can do other work while they are taking care of our order's fulfillment, and moreover, their support is just amazing! They are very responsive and resolve the problems as soon as you request.Their pricing is decent and it is so easy to use. I am not a tech person at all, and if I can use it, everyone can use it :) I highly recommend ShipBob!

classification.summary: A satisfied ShipBob customer is praising their fulfillment services, ease of use, and support quality with no indication of switching providers.

content.body: We've used ShipBob ever since we launched 3 years ago and we couldn't be happier with our partnership. Their analytics dashboard is fascinating and user-friendly to pull data, track shipments, and track inventory. Our products have shipped to over 40 countries and ShipBob has had no issue. ShipBob is not just a 3PL, they are a true partner. They also do a good job of seeing areas of improvement for my company. They’ve introduced me to 4–5 companies that they think could be beneficial in specific areas, such as marketing or online reviews. You can’t really put a price on people I never would’ve met if it weren’t for having a good partnership with ShipBob. ShipBob does a good job of treating every brand they work with as a brand of their own. They’re like a large portfolio overseeing the development of different brands, and you can tell that they’re people you can trust. They’re not just throwing my products in poly mailers and sending them out; they’re a much more in-depth company.

classification.summary: Satisfied ShipBob customer praising their 3PL partnership, analytics capabilities, global shipping reach, and consultative business approach.

content.body: This is super easy and the customer service has been fantastic. We've been a long time customer of Shipbob and despite growing very fast they've kept up extremely well and have been great to work with.

classification.summary: Satisfied long-time ShipBob customer praising their service quality and ability to scale with growing demand.

content.body: Using ShipBob for almost two years now. Seamless Shopify integration. Orders go directly to the ShipBob dashboard and are marked 'fulfilled' in Shopify once they're ready. We will keep working with ShipBob. They keep improving to continuously get even better. Really recommend using ShipBob.

classification.summary: Jimmy Joy USA is a satisfied ShipBob customer praising their Shopify integration and service quality with no indication of switching providers.

content.body: We have used Shipbob for the past 4 months after migrating from a more antiquated fulfillment organization. We evaluated 5 fulfillment organizations prior to choosing Shipbob. There are 3 major reasons we chose Shipbob. First, Shipbob gave us the ability to analyze how to distribute our product across multiple warehouses in different parts of the US. Currently, we use 2 locations and are debating with Shipbob about moving our products into a 3rd location. The primary advantage of multiple locations has been reduced shipping cost, however with the winter storms and COVID we have also been able to fulfill out of an alternative location when one of the locations has been offline. This process has been automated and seamless which has saved us from a major customer satisfaction issue. The second reason we chose Shipbob is that they are truly partnering with us. They have made recommendations (location, box size, etc..) to help us reduce costs. Their pricing transparency and reporting is excellent and has helped us close our monthly reporting days earlier than with our prior fulfillment vendor. Lastly, we chose Shipbob because of its ease of integration and Dashboard. Everything from setting it up to running your shipping, changing addresses, chasing down customer sat issues etc... is available to us in an easy to use, intuitive, user friendly dashboard. Ultimately, we are very pleased with our decision to partner with Shipbob.

classification.summary: Skinesa is a satisfied ShipBob customer praising their multi-location fulfillment network, cost optimization, partnership approach, and user-friendly dashboard, with plans to expand to a third warehouse location.

content.body: This app is so easy to use. It does all the work in the background. Orders are automatically added from Shopify to ShipStation...NO double entry of orders needed! We have it connected to our USPS/UPS/FedEx accounts and for $9 a month, this is one of the best decisions you can make. ShipStation also creates a packing slip which we include with all the orders for a customer receipt.

classification.summary: Customer is satisfied with ShipStation's automation capabilities and affordable pricing for order management and fulfillment.

content.body: The integration works smoothly & whenever we've needed customer service, Shipbob has been speedy in responding.

classification.summary: Barefoot Scientist is satisfied with ShipBob's smooth integration and responsive customer service.

content.body: ShipBob is the 3rd fulfillment partner that we've migrated to in 4 years of growing our operations. Compared to what we've used in the past (plus about half a dozen options we only reviewed, but never used), they're really putting the users first. They're not just a logistics/freight company offering ecom fulfillment - they really give us the tools and options we need for our business. Whether it's inventory insights, custom packaging and marketing inserts, analytics and exports, or helping us optimize our pricing by figuring out which of their warehouses to use, it's really, really nice to have a fulfillment partner like ShipBob on our side.

classification.summary: A satisfied ShipBob customer praises their fulfillment partner's tools, analytics, and customization options after switching from multiple previous providers.

content.body: ShipBob's app integrates very well with Shopify and allows our order flow to automatically (*there is a slight sync delay*) appear in ShipBob's order management software. From there, the orders are picked, packed and shipped. This automated integration is key to any small business that needs their 3PL to do the heavy lifting! ShipBob is a massive player in the 3PL space and you should definitely give them a look to see if they can satisfy your needs and the needs of your customer.

classification.summary: A satisfied ShipBob customer recommends their 3PL service for its strong Shopify integration and automated order management capabilities.

content.body: As far as 3pls go, Shipbob is the best I've worked with! In my personal opinion, more than cheap shipping rates and automatic fulfillment, having insight into exactly what's happening at the warehouse level is my top priority. Shipbob makes this possible with their software-- absolutely unparalleled. It provides full transparency into each stage of the pick & pack process and when there are issues (impossible to avoid in logistics), our Merchant Success Manager is just an email, phone call, or text away as well as support which is pretty responsive to my requests. I'm physically 10 timezones removed from where we ship from so that's super helpful. Shipbob's claim/reimbursement policy for lost or damages parcels is super fair, whereas other 3PLs I've worked with can leave you with huge bills, missing stock, and no way to find out why or where your products are. I love shipbob!

classification.summary: Customer is praising ShipBob's warehouse visibility, software transparency, and responsive support while contrasting it with poor experiences from other 3PLs.

content.body: Really simple to use and navigate around. Quick and responsive, an easy way to see a summary of your business and key action areas

classification.summary: Customer praising the ease of use and responsiveness of a platform for viewing business summaries and identifying action items.

content.body: ShipBob has completely transformed our business. We've grown drastically over the last few years and that would not have been possible without ShipBob. Our customer experience is up, shipping timelines are quick, and the seamless syncing between ShipBob and Shopify keeps everything running efficiently.

classification.summary: Satisfied ShipBob customer praising the platform's impact on business growth, customer experience, and operational efficiency.

content.body: This app integrates seamlessly with our Shopify fulfillment setup. Works perfectly. Set it and forget it.

classification.summary: Satisfied customer praising Saltbox's seamless Shopify integration and reliable fulfillment automation.

content.body: I had few issues with a carrier but easyship got back to me and solved the problem, their customer services has definitely improved

classification.summary: Customer had carrier issues resolved by easyship and notes their customer service has improved.

content.body: The integration with Shopify works great and Shipbob's technology and fulfillment network have allowed us to reduce costs and get our products to our customers quicker. Also, their analytics dashboard allows us to have all the data we need to run our business more efficiently. Highly recommended!

classification.summary: Customer is praising ShipBob's Shopify integration, fulfillment network, cost reduction, speed, and analytics capabilities.

content.body: The Shipbob app and warehouses have made our lives so much easier. The seem less integration allows us to focus on growing our business. The ability to use all their warehouse across the world allows us to provide 2-day shipping!!!

classification.summary: Customer is satisfied with ShipBob's multi-warehouse network and integration capabilities, enabling fast 2-day shipping and business growth.

content.body: The app has so many problems, and the customer support team seems never care solving them, after sharing my problem with the team, they didn't got back with the right answers,

classification.summary: Customer is frustrated with app functionality and unresponsive customer support that failed to provide adequate solutions.

content.body: This is my primary shipping application - the features are good, but there seems to be an issue approximately 1 in 15 to 20 times you go to use it. Most of the issues stem from Shipstation Connect as I use a mac. I've spoken to them and they agreed this app is problematic. It works, just not all of the time and needs to be reconnected frequently. The service is powerful, but you need to be patient and it's difficult to count on.

classification.summary: User relies on Shipstation for shipping but experiences frequent connectivity issues and unreliability, particularly with the Mac version, requiring frequent reconnections.

content.body: Thanks to this app, I was able to go global, and I succeeded!! I now sell my product internationally. Every day customers are buying from all over the world. The parcels go every day very far from my place without any problem and with total ease. Merely the best shipping service I have ever had. Come on, an all-in-one solution that gives to your customer: Price of transportTransport time Customs fees And this in every country of the world.

classification.summary: A satisfied customer praising their shipping app's global capabilities and all-in-one solution for international order fulfillment.

content.body: Late December I contact 3 warehouse manager software Ship Hero, SKU Vault, and Finale Inventory. I spent 15 hours meeting with the 3 companies and meeting with 2 3PL one worked with Ship Hero the other with Sku Vault. By far Ship Hero is the best option for Shopify merchants. It's almost like it was build for it. We had to leave the 3PL that we were using within weeks and setup a 4000sq. warehouse. Reasons for leaving:1. 3PL had 1.5%-3% order error in peak months. 2. picker and packer were not efficient.3. Inventory was never correct.4. Shipping Amazon orders took too long5. No API integration with Shopify Plus. The solution: Ship Hero1. Error margin 0.01%2. picker and packer positions cut in half3. inventory is accurate 99%4. Integration with Amazon5. Ship Hero and Shopify Plus connect in minutes. If it wasn't for Ship Hero and Yosef Haas we wouldn't have been able to setup a warehouse in weeks. They advised us in all purchases from Racks to Scanners.During the learning phase (3 weeks) we meet with Ship Hero almost everyday. Onboarding team is extremely knowledgable and responsive. They don't let you struggle through setup mode which is already hard as it is. I couldn't be any happier or more satisfied with their software. Thanks Yosef PS. If Ship Hero didn't exist I would never want to own a warehouse.

classification.summary: A satisfied Shopify merchant shares their positive experience switching from a problematic 3PL to an in-house warehouse powered by Ship Hero software, highlighting improvements in order accuracy, efficiency, and system integration.

content.body: This app has absolutely changed our business. I Heart Wall Art ship lots of big and bulky items from our workshop outside a major city and it's always been a nightmare to try and find good courier rates. We're getting the best details we've ever had now, and have found the system easy to use and incorporate into our business.

classification.summary: An Australian ecommerce brand is praising their current shipping/fulfillment solution for resolving their previous challenges with courier rates and service details for bulky items.

content.body: We have been working with the Easyship team for a number of months to launch serviecs with them in the USA. The app worked perfectly and the level of support we received from the Easyship team was and is first class.

classification.summary: Customer is satisfied with Easyship's app and support services after launching USA operations with them.

content.body: Shiphero is perfect. Everything works as it should and it is helping us scale and handle order volume seamlessly. If you're looking to outsource your shipping, look no further. Shiphero is the one.

classification.summary: NooWave is satisfied with Shiphero's fulfillment services and recommends it for scaling order volume.

content.body: What a fantastic company. Not only are they effective and efficient, but their customer service is superb. Really helped us out on a personal level with our business on top of doing an excellent job at fulfillment.

classification.summary: Existing Saltbox customer praising the company's fulfillment efficiency, customer service, and personal business support.

content.body: As a brand that has been used to using Amazon FBA, the thought of handling international shipping from our Shopify store was admittedly daunting. Easyship has made the transition straight forward. We have connected with their partnered 3PLs in Hong Kong and the US who have also been great to work with. Being able to sync orders from Shopify to our 3PLs via Easyship has saved a lot of time. Especially since we don't have to prepare any shipping documents. The onboarding process and customer support has also been great so far.

classification.summary: Tawbury transitioned from Amazon FBA to using Easyship for international fulfillment via Shopify-connected 3PLs and is satisfied with the streamlined process and support.

content.body: If I could give more, they'll get more...to make up for these 1-star toxic reviews. Be reasonable people. The setup can take some time as with many TP services/plugins, but the team at Easyship are extremely friendly and will go out of their way to help you if you're nice and easy to deal with too. I'd recommend setting up a demo phone call, keep a good relationship (as you should with business), and you'll have a seamless experience. They offer some serious analytical tools for an extra, But the basic free package is good enough. Good courier pricing as well. Personally, I've dealt with much third-party software, and the two account managers, Michelle and Shivanjali were top-notch. 10 out of 10. Definitely ask for their help if you're based in the States or APAC. Cheers guys, keep up the good work. Look forward to any new features. -Cal

classification.summary: A satisfied Easyship customer is defending the service against negative reviews and praising their account managers and overall experience.

content.body: Easyship is really amazing. It makes shipping super convenient. All I have to do is sync the orders and click on a button and make the payment. The courier comes by to collect it and will then deliver to my customers. It's that bloody easy. Definitely a great app to have for any e-commerce store!

classification.summary: Customer is praising Easyship's shipping and fulfillment app functionality, not expressing any need for Saltbox services.

content.body: Very useful platform with lots of customization. Makes things easy on the back end but they seem to have completely abandoned ship, so if you need support you can't find it. No one answers their support emails. A shame! I hope someone can start looking after this again so I don't have to migrate to another platform.

classification.summary: Customer is frustrated with lack of support from their current platform and is considering migrating to an alternative provider.

content.body: When you sign up they set up a meeting with you and a rep from ShipStation. My rep didn't even bother showing up to the meeting and ignored all his emails and phone calls I made over the weekend. Also their customer support line is a dead number. The platform doesn't work and all these negative reviews really were right. Seems like a fake app. Don't bother

classification.summary: User is dissatisfied with ShipStation's poor customer service, unresponsive representatives, and non-functional platform, and is actively looking to switch providers.

content.body: Fantastic App! Some serious work ethics here compared to other apps I used before, i would really recommend this service.

classification.summary: This is a positive review praising the app's work ethics and recommending the service to others.

content.body: DO NOT BOTHER with this waste of time shipping middle man. Over 75% of all shipments made through them have had problems. Now I know that they are just a middle man acting as agents for courier companies... but therein lies the problem. when you have a problem with your shipment, and I GUARANTEE you will, the only way to contact them is to open a support ticket which takes two days to receive a reply which is usually incomplete or inaccurate. the latest incident was a package picked up on 12/15/20 with a 2 - 5 day delivery service... 21 days later this is still not delivered and all I get from the email reply to my service request is "this in normal...we will look into it".... after three previous replies asking for confirmation that I want assistance. meanwhile my customers are leaving negative reviews because of their service.Bottom line.... do not install this app or use this joke of a freight middle man. Yes their rates are good... but dissatisfied customers leaving negative reviews about your company do not make up for the pennies saved.

classification.summary: Customer is actively warning others against using Saltbox due to severe shipping delays, poor customer support response times, and resulting negative customer reviews.

content.body: My team and I had a seamless transition to Shiphero. I have been able to speed up all my processes to better scale my stores in our new warehouse. Friendly support team really cares about your success. Only complain is that I didn't use it sooner!

classification.summary: Alien Outfitters successfully transitioned to Shiphero and achieved faster processes and better scaling capabilities with good support.

content.body: I give five star for the App! I wish it will have mobile friendly version in the future ;) fighting!

classification.summary: Customer is satisfied with the app but requesting a mobile-friendly version in the future.

content.body: using shipstation for 6 years on a large ecommerce store, now to find out they do not support DMARC for email validation and all emails are now bouncing!

classification.summary: Long-time ShipStation user is frustrated with lack of DMARC email validation support causing email delivery failures and is venting about the platform's limitations.

content.body: Wasted my time - don't waste yours. Sounded like it had everything I needed - dimensional weight calculations, shipping rules, carrier rates displayed to customers, but virtually none of these things worked. Support was of no help, I have multiple tickets still open with them and it has been a month now with no answers. Wish it would of worked, but after multiple emails, (repeated) screenshots showing issues, there has been no resolutions. I can easily imagine what would happen if I ran into an issue down the road with them and needed help - it would be nothing.

classification.summary: Customer is abandoning their current fulfillment/shipping solution due to non-functional features and unresponsive support, and is actively seeking an alternative.

content.body: This is an excellent app offering seamless labelling etc. and competitive pricing with top courier firms, if you choose carefully (i.e. not Hermes). I use UPS who are generally considered a quality firm. They have misdirected a few parcels and the largest order I have sent I chose to insure, which I usually don't bother with. Well the insurance claim after UPS delivered it to the wrong address and it disappeared has been a complete farce. Fortunately I have only one insurance claim on the go as I wouldn't have the time or headspace to chase up several....It has been over two months of back and forth emails.As I said I put the odd cock up from UPS down to what I am not losing through instore pilferage. It would really help if the couriers photographed the door (with GPS coordinates) they are delivering to, instead of grabbing a 'signature' which doesn't really help much.

classification.summary: User is frustrated with courier service quality and insurance claim handling processes, highlighting delivery failures and lack of accountability measures.

content.body: This app are a bunch of professionals know what they are doing. This app are a bunch of professionals know what they are doing

classification.summary: Customer praising the professionalism and competence of an app/service (likely Shopify-related, not directly about fulfillment).

content.body: We use Easyship to provide live shipping rates at checkout to our customers in Australia and soon we will start Worldwide. It's definitely increased our conversion rate! The customer service of Easyship is also excellent and very proactive

classification.summary: Grace & Maggie is satisfied with Easyship's shipping rate solutions and customer service, reporting improved conversion rates for their Australia and upcoming worldwide operations.

content.body: EasyShip is great. They seem to be committed to listing to their users and coming up with innovative ideas to make shipping easier. I cannot recommend EasyShip enough.

classification.summary: Customer is praising EasyShip's commitment to innovation and user-centric approach to shipping solutions.

content.body: Highly recommend! This app is super wonderful! super supe supe supe supe supe supe supe supe wonderful!

classification.summary: A satisfied customer leaving a positive review about an app with enthusiastic but somewhat repetitive praise.

content.body: I tried to get this to work, followed the outlined steps but ultimately it would not connect to stamps.com.

classification.summary: Customer experienced technical integration issues between their ecommerce platform and stamps.com shipping service despite following setup instructions.

content.body: I would NEVER recommend this fulfillment company to anyone... especially a startup that is trying to build their reputation. Shipmonk has been the biggest headache for me. I am the founder of my company and have direct interaction with the Shipmonk team and software on a daily basis. They have lost my product (numerous times) and blame me for it every time. Never apologizing even once it is found. They literally LOSE my product and I have to pay for their team to look for it. They charge extreme amounts for a service that is hardly fulfilled. "Over promise, Under deliver" is how I would rate Shipmonk. They do a great job at selling you on their services and once you move all your inventory and really invest in them, they start treating you like you're worth nothing to them. I currently have orders backed up for 7 days when their expected shipping timeframe is 3 days or less. No apologies just excuses. "It's a busy time of year." they say. I never take the time to write reviews but I felt this was absolutely necessary. I hope you consider ALL OTHER options before partnering with Shipmonk. Please feel free to call me directly if you'd like a more personal review of this company. 954-707-0665

classification.summary: Founder is actively seeking to switch away from ShipMonk due to repeated product loss, poor customer service, delayed shipments, and excessive charges for subpar fulfillment.

content.body: The support staff is very responsive. I had several concerns when starting to use the app and they were addressed right away.

classification.summary: Customer praises Saltbox's responsive support team for quickly addressing their initial concerns with the app.

content.body: I would summarise the issues with this shipment provider, all based on our work with them for almost 10 months. 1) You will never see transparent pricing, they display only shipment and handling fees to you, the rest is being charged on the background. So your actual bill is never known, until u dig into this.2) Loosing packages all the time, in our case is $300 worth of parcel. When they do this here is the scenario:- If insured, claim will be reviewed for months, till now we still wasn't reimbursed for any;- If not insured, NEVER takes responsibility, saying "not our fault, but logistics provider, so we won't do anything". While this is them who is service provider for us, legally we ask them, they ask logistics company, bc if we message to lets say DHL, their response will be "u r not our client". The normal practice is when your shipment is not insured, at least shipping cost is supposed to be refunded as service you paid for wasn't delivered, but not with these guys;3) If they made a mistake on inventory side, they will ask you for $40/hour so some person in warehouse could fix it. So you should pay for mistakes they make;4) Customer support, unresponsive and incompetent. If certain cases are addressed in time, they still can be resolved, but not with these guys. What shipmonk support does is basically trying just to reply anything or blaming anyone else instead of addressing the issue, probably for their internal records. Connecting to the shipmonk will bring you only headache. I was really surprised how such a low quality service can be provided by a US company.

classification.summary: Long-term customer deeply frustrated with hidden pricing, lost packages, poor claims handling, unexpected fees for error corrections, and unresponsive support, actively seeking alternative fulfillment provider.

content.body: Fulfillrite has been an amazing fulfillment partner, allowing us to focus on growing our business. Our account rep Josh provides excellent customer service whenever we have questions or special projects. Easy software setup, transparent pricing, orders come and packages get shipped out. Since we switched to Fulfillrite we get a lot of compliments from customers on how fast they receive their orders. Would highly recommend to any other merchants!

classification.summary: A satisfied customer of competitor Fulfillrite is praising their fulfillment services and fast shipping performance.

content.body: Great app and very useful. Fast communication and very helpful agent which will help you with all your questions.

classification.summary: Satisfied customer praising Saltbox's app quality, communication speed, and helpful support team.

content.body: Shiphero has been one of the best decisions for our logistics. We have been able to handle more order volume efficiently and more precisely. It has even allowed us to expand our warehouse operations. The platform is easy to understand and use. Support has also been amazing and has sponsored special requirements for our business model.

classification.summary: A satisfied Shiphero customer praising the platform's ease of use, support, and ability to handle increased order volume and expand warehouse operations.

content.body: Our experience with Shiphero has been awesome! PROS- Incredibly efficient pick/pack/ship. We have almost doubled our efficiency in the warehouse.- Accurately pushes inventory levels to many sales channels- Customer support is responsive and actually cares- Easy to use kitting/bundling- Automated shipping rate shopping CONS- Steeper learning curve than some software- Initial setup takes time to do correctly - Minimal reporting analytics

classification.summary: Customer is highly satisfied with Shiphero's warehouse efficiency and has doubled their fulfillment capacity, though they note some initial setup complexity and limited reporting features.

content.body: Shipmonk is a true fulfillment partner. We have the assurance that the most important part of our business (deliveries) is going smoothly. It's plug and play once you're in their system! We focus on sales, and our partner Shipmonk takes care of the rest!

classification.summary: Customer is satisfied with ShipMonk's fulfillment services and highlights their reliability and ease of integration.

content.body: I am speaking to all of my fellow Shopify store owners in order to confirm that the hype is real. ShipHero came highly recommended and they have absolutely lived up to their 5-star reputation. ShipHero makes managing the most important aspects of your business efficient and easy while also providing an unbeatable platform to process your daily orders. ShipHero is constantly releasing new and useful features and because it is a cloud-based software, I instantly have access to these new features with no additional fees. If you sell through multiple vendors there is no doubt in my mind that this is the inventory management software for you. Like clockwork throughout the day, ShipHero quickly imports all of our orders from all of our vendors across the web. Most importantly, their customer support is extremely attentive and helpful.

classification.summary: A satisfied ShipHero customer is publicly praising the platform's order management, multi-vendor inventory integration, and customer support.

content.body: What fulfillment company locks you into a contract and charges you to get your goods back if you're not pleased with their service!? Horrible experience, the charged us almost 3x more than our current fulfillment provider. The system in which inventory is imported is confusing at best. My gut feeling is the measurements are off so they can charge more for storage. we were paying more than 2x what we pay now for storage. Over $5,000 worth of our shipmonk inventory ended up on ebay months after we bit the bullet and moved all inventory to another fulfillment. Yes Our Items Were STOLEN after They charged us thousands of dollars to pick up our inventory! WTF If you're reading this don't make the same mistake we did!

classification.summary: Customer had a terrible experience with ShipMonk's inflated pricing, confusing inventory system, potential measurement fraud, and theft of inventory, and is warning others against making the same mistake.

content.body: Great company. They do a great job providing logistic services and are not very expensive. Highly recommend.

classification.summary: Satisfied customer praising Saltbox's logistics services and competitive pricing.

content.body: Seamless integration with our website. Great rates especially for the US. Also received great support from David in Melbourne!!

classification.summary: Satisfied customer from Australia praising Saltbox's seamless integration, competitive rates, and excellent customer support from David.

content.body: We have been using their international shipment for 3 months. Overall, the experience is positive. Our initial shipments were for our Indiegogo campaign. They worked with us to use batch shipment to save cost. After that, we are using their regular service for our daily orders. Their UI interface gives you a clear view of shipping cost and duty tax for each available shipping option. Although there are some glitches with the app, they will work with you to fix them quickly. They don't own warehouse, so, all the pick and pack work you will work directly with the 3rd party warehouse that they recommend. Although initially, we were worried about communication issues between 3 parties, it turns out to be a none-issue. We are very happy with the warehouse they recommended. Suggestion for improvement to them is the post-shipment support. You will be getting typical scripted answers many times. But that make you frustrated especially for orders that are stuck or missing. If Easyship wants to be differentiated from their competitors, establishing an effective communication channel with the couriers that they provide can be a game changer. Because that will allow them to provide more info to the clients when a shipment is running into issues during shipment. By the way, have a good relationship with your account manager is important. They have been very helpful in every occasion.

classification.summary: Customer is satisfied with Easyship's international shipping and warehouse partner but suggests improving post-shipment support and courier communication to differentiate from competitors.

content.body: Where do I begin? It improved my efficiency a lot and I really like it. The team is very helpful....

classification.summary: Customer expressing satisfaction with Saltbox's efficiency improvements and helpful team support.

content.body: By far the worse company ever!! Please do not do business with them unless you like losing money. They will never take responsibility, overcharge you and shift blame every chance they get. I've lost major account/sales cause i've done business based on their empty promises. Very poor service in terms of responding clients concerns; when they are going to ship out and send packages, it will take so long! They are not fast and very unreliable. Customer receives wrong items & colors; damaged items and others. Lastly, shipping fees are very costly, not worth with what you paid for in their bad service.

classification.summary: Customer experienced significant losses due to poor service, unreliability, overcharging, slow shipping, and incorrect orders, and is actively seeking to switch providers.

content.body: Easyship has been a game changer for my business. I would recomend this app to anyone starting a product based ecommerce business.

classification.summary: Oak Lab Design is praising Easyship as a fulfillment solution for their ecommerce business, not indicating any need for alternative services.

content.body: Used to like this app, but right before the holiday season they decide to change things up. Instead of using usps.com to track usps orders, it now links to stamps.com tracking which is hideous. And there isn't a way to revert it. Cool... Also, you can create batches of labels, which is useful, but it's been years and they haven't been able to allow other employees to access said batches. So I can't see batches my coworkers make, or edit them. Which kinda sucks. I think shipstation is good if you do small amounts of shipping. I think we've out grown them, and it's disappointing.

classification.summary: Growing ecommerce brand has outgrown ShipStation due to lack of batch sharing/editing capabilities and unwanted platform changes, and is actively considering alternatives.

content.body: The App drew my attention during the outbreak and luckily it solved my issue. The App drew my attention during the outbreak and luckily it solved my issue.

classification.summary: Customer expresses satisfaction with an app that resolved an issue during a crisis period.

content.body: Our business ships thousands of items each week and sells thousands of SKUs. We do: -Presales-Donations-B2B transfers-Identify 1st orders and add notes to them (and much more customer delight)-Change carrier service based on customers location-Integrated with Flavorcloud international shipping-Integrated with their 3PL service Shiphero can do it all and their team is extremely helpful in leading my team to confidence on their platform. Ultimately Shiphero is a complex and powerful tool that should not be underestimated. With Shiphero we focus on "How to do X?", rather than "Is X possible?", bc more often than not: Yes with Shiphero it is possible. Additional note: Their UI is polished to make the basics shine. My single quip is that they do not allow for "OR" "AND" in order searches

classification.summary: A satisfied Shiphero user with high shipping volume praising the platform's capabilities and flexibility, with a minor complaint about search filter limitations.

content.body: I am using this app now. Very responsible agent. I am using this app now. Very responsible agent. good app

classification.summary: Customer is satisfied with the app and praises the responsible agent support.

content.body: I'm honestly amazed about how smooth and easy the experience of working with ShipMonk has been so far. They ship everything in a timely manner, most of the time only hours after the orders are placed. The logistics used are great, and orders are being delivered super fast. Their support team is great, from the first person I talked to when I was doing some quotes, to everyone in the onboarding team and happiness engineers. They are super helpful and polite! The onboarding experience is well made to ensure they only ship the right pending orders on Shopify (not all 3PL companies worry about that, and it's critical to avoid errors when switching from another company or another fulfillment model). Dashboard looks clean and very well built. Fulfillment is not an easy task, but they made it easy to understand and find what you are looking for very fast. The algorithm can help a lot with inventory forecasting. Honestly, I have only good things to say. I'm a customer for less than a month, but so far, they were perfect. I don't usually write long reviews, but they deserved this. Keep it up, and congrats on the high-quality job. You awesome people at ShipMonk really make a difference and a big positive impact on a business. Thank you so much!

classification.summary: A satisfied ShipMonk customer praising their fulfillment services, speed, support quality, and dashboard functionality with no indication of interest in switching providers.

content.body: AVOID £200 additional billing in just one month and NO CUSTOMER SUPPORT, even on the HIGHER SUBSCRIPTION IM PAYING FOR. Infuriating customer support, i pay to have phone support and have emailed, called and nothing for a month! I managed to speak to someone today, they could not wait to get me off the phone, they said they would call me back in a few minutes, nothing and now i cant get through on that number. A month to get set up, various bills over £200 no explanation. Truly terrible experience, STILL waiting!!!,,,,,,..............

classification.summary: Customer is extremely dissatisfied with unexpected £200+ charges and complete lack of responsive customer support despite paying for a higher-tier subscription with phone support.

content.body: UPDATE - 29 SEPT 2020 - so it turns out that Easyship use totally the wrong HS product codes for international shipments. A shipping app that can't cope with HS Codes??!! Really??? So, even if you have the correct HS Codes for your products in Shopify, Easyship say "due to a technical limitation, the HS code will not always pull through correctly, meaning a discrepancy between the information on Shopify and what is converted to Easyship". This means all your Commercial Invoices will be wrong. Surely getting this right is a comedy basic of any shipping app claiming to be a shipping app??! It's greatly taken the shine off what was a good experience until now...we only found this out because of a parcel getting stopped by customs with a question about a product's HS Code...not ideal!Unfortunately it also turns out there's no way to update your product listings in Easyship to fix this either...so you are knowingly giving customs the wrong info. Not great. In fact pretty poor. 2ND SEPT 2020We just installed Easyship to help us manage the UPS shipping process for our UK based store. We're really glad we did!! UPS can't integrate easily (understatement!) so we were having to manually enter every shipment into the UPS website (arrgh). Easyship solved this problem for us relatively easily and now works like a dream. Not only does Easyship make our shipping workflow/paperwork much easier and faster but it also solves our dynamic pricing at checkout so customers automatically see our special UPS shipping rates alongside our Royal Mail rates...awesome! Our only feedback would be that setting it up required quite a lot of research and there were some really helpful (although slightly out of date) videos on the Easyship YouTube channel - and we defo couldn't have done it without these. They steered us in the right direction and we were able to fill in most set-up gaps. What would be really useful is a step-by-step set up video guide for a Shopify Store if someone can make one so that all the set up steps are in one place. We linked to our UPS account and rates really easily and the initial glitch we had with creating labels/UPS tracking was resolved quickly after an online chat with Easyship support - they were super helpful and took time to understand the issue and help us get it fixed and followed up. The system is easily customisable and user friendly. All in all a really good experience - highly recommend. P.S. If we had one request it would be to work on integration with Royal Mail Click & Drop in the UK.

classification.summary: UK-based ecommerce store frustrated with Easyship's inability to correctly handle HS product codes for international shipments, causing customs issues and inaccurate commercial invoices with no way to fix the problem.

content.body:
I love this app! I've not ever had logistical problems using it and it's really helped me to streamline my shipping, so I can get orders out effectively and efficiently.
My customers are always please when they receive their orders, and the Easyship customer service is amazing! Would definitely recommend this app for businesses small or large.

classification.summary: This is a positive review of Easyship's shipping app praising its logistics efficiency, customer service, and reliability, not a prospect for Saltbox.

content.body: Wish we had have found Easyship 5 years ago. Streamlined our processes and made time-consuming tasks effortless. Much cheaper than other shipping companies as well - at least 1/3 cheaper on most routes.

classification.summary: Customer expresses satisfaction with Easyship's streamlined processes and significantly lower shipping costs compared to competitors, but this is a retrospective review rather than an active buying signal.

content.body: They have amazing support who will reach out to your asap whenever you need them. They are working to make their platform better and more efficient so we can like have a one-stop-shop

classification.summary: Customer praises Saltbox's responsive support and ongoing platform improvements toward offering integrated fulfillment solutions.

content.body:
UPDATE 9/9/2020
DO NOT DO NOT DO NOT!!!! GO THRU SHIPSTATION!!!!
I decided to give them another chance, even though the packages would come back with overage charges (one yard sign, purchase price $13.50, shipping cost was 10.85, overage charges of $108.75!!!)  Customer service Maia, told me that she would take care of it.  We contacted UPS, and they said too bad.  But Shipstation took care of me...., that was for the original review.
So, I decided to protect myself by taking pics of EVERY SINGLE PACKAGE that leaves here, all the same packages.  And again, MORE overage charges.So I went ahead contact Shipstation, sent pictures and stated I was being overcharged again.  All of my packages are the same size, they always ship out daily, I spent over $400 in shippng yesterday ALONE.  And this is the customer service I get...I was hoping they would help....NOPE!  This was the response from Shantice D., after I told her I am ready to leave if they aren't going to protect me from all of these ridiculous charges  	Shantice D. (ShipStation)Sep 9, 2020, 10:35 AM CDTHi Julie,
Thanks for your reply. I do apologize for any inconvenience, however, this decision is ultimately up to the carrier based on the dimensions entered compared to what UPS says they actually are.
We appreciate you working with us. Take care and have a great day.
Best,Shantice D.User Success SpecialistCheck out our upcoming Support Webinars"
Needless to say...go to shippo or even contact the carriers directly.  The hidden charges are more expensive than going thru shipstation, in the long run.
This review should be a negative 5 star....they should have to give me stars!absolutely WORST customer service ever (see below for transcript)!  Go to shippo, go straight to the carriers, hell drive your orders out to your customers.  THIS IS NOT THE APP TO DO IT!!!
I ship alot of packages every day....so far this month 321 packages (not bad for a little old lady sitting at home).  And I was looking for a way to mainline my shipping process.  I came across this program and have had nothing but trouble.  But NOTHING beats this week!
They charged me $120 for ONE package that was shipped about an hour away.  Now this package weighed LESS THAN 2 lbs, and had dimensions of 25x19x1.  and when I questioned it, I was basically told "too bad, deal with it".  So I want an explanation.  They claim that I was being hit by all of these backcharges at once, but NO explanation on what the back charges were???
I questioned and questioned over and over again.  STILL no answer.  Here is the latest correspondence trying to find out why i was being charged so much?  Same size package shipped 45mins away (really wish I just drove it myself), charged $10 originally, and $17 back charge???? FOR WHAT????

content.body: We have been Ship Station customers for years, and apart from being somewhat buggy we have never had any real problems.We changed to a Shopify store a year ago, and I need to integrate Shopify with Ship Station.Now, I realize why there are all these complaints about their customer service.I have requested a call back from a tech support person on two occasions and it hasn't happened either time.  The first time they actually made an appointment to call, but never did.The second time they were supposed to email to set up an appointment. It has been a week and no email.The support we have received via Live Chat has been good, but should there be a serious problem with integration, I have no confidence that I could ever reach a live person to resolve it.When we started with Ship Station, we had an account manager who helped us set it up. Now, like every other tech company, they think its OK to skimp on live support to save money. Unfortunately for them, there are lots of other options available now, and we will be looking at alternatives.

classification.summary: Customer is actively looking to switch from Ship Station due to poor customer support and lack of callback follow-through on integration issues.

content.body:
Lost 3 hours of my sleep time trying to generate a set of shipping labels and in frustration left a scathing review of the service in frustration.
What happened next changed my perspective about the Easyship team.The customer service & tech teams were super reactive in investigating the issue, resolving it and at the time communicating promptly with me(including phone calls) as regards what was causing the issue in the first place and what they were doing to fix it.
The fault in the first place was not entirely theirs..it was the Hermes API that was rejecting long SKU codes and hence the issue).Overall, few improvements yet to be introduced including the option to print labels in-store and better rates negotiation with the courier guys but if they work the way they are at the moment, they will win hearts and businesses in the long run. Highly reccomend these guys.

classification.summary: Customer initially had a negative experience with Easyship's shipping label generation but was impressed by their responsive customer service and technical support in resolving the issue.

content.body: I originally wrote this review under the wrong app.  Wanted to put it in the correct place. Overall we have been relatively disappointed with this product. It is extremely powerful but is missing basic functionality that can make it or break it for your company depending on your business model. We operate with a lot of backorders, when stock comes in and is processed in for receipt, we need our oldest orders (customers who have been patiently waiting) to get their items first. The ship hero system randomly decides where to allocate it with no ryme or reason. It generally will skip tons of older orders and allocate it to newer orders; it will randomly give a couple to a bigger order and skip the rest, it just doesnt make any sense how it works. In many cases it will remove allocation from someone that has been waiting and give their products to other people. The system just simply needs to work where it allocates stock to the oldest orders first, if the user chooses to move an order up to a higher priority then they can do that themselves. If it wasn't for this constant struggle we are having with this allocation fiasco we would give it five stars.

classification.summary: User is frustrated with ShipHero's stock allocation system that doesn't prioritize oldest orders first, causing them to consider alternatives despite the product's power.

content.body:
Has the basis of being great but so many glitches and the amount of additional charges that come in each week in addition to the shipping charges is unreasonable. I regularly had issues with no shipping options being available for a lot of stock, so I would consistently have to book a courier outside the platform, defeating the purpose of the app.
One big issue was the inability to ship an order that has 2 boxes, only option is to ship them separately at double the cost- this is something they said they were working on months ago that had a 2 week deadline but it is still not an active feature.

classification.summary: Customer is frustrated with recurring glitches, hidden fees, shipping limitations (especially multi-box orders), and unmet promises on platform improvements.

content.body: Where do I start! the idea and roadmap they have are great but what they say they offer doesn't work.
